figure: First direct text-to-3D Gaussian Splatting model that jointly models camera poses and multi-view images via a dual-stream architecture
abstract: VideoRFSplat introduces a text-to-3D model that generates realistic 3D Gaussian Splatting for unbounded scenes by leveraging a video generation model. It addresses instability in joint modeling of camera poses and multi-view images through a dual-stream architecture and an asynchronous sampling strategy, achieving superior results without post-hoc refinement.

title: DeepMesh: Auto-Regressive Artist-mesh Creation with Reinforcement Learning
figure: First auto-regressive mesh generation framework that incorporates Reinforcement Learning for human preference alignment.
abstract: DeepMesh introduces a novel framework for generating triangle meshes using an auto-regressive approach enhanced by Reinforcement Learning. It addresses limitations in face counts and mesh completeness through a new tokenization algorithm and a scoring standard that combines human evaluation with 3D metrics. The method generates detailed meshes conditioned on point clouds and images, achieving supe

title: Bolt3D: Generating 3D Scenes in Seconds
figure: First fast feed-forward 3D scene generator using latent diffusion.
abstract: Bolt3D introduces a latent diffusion model for rapid 3D scene generation from images, achieving high-fidelity results in under seven seconds. It utilizes existing 2D diffusion architectures and a large-scale multiview dataset for training, significantly reducing inference costs compared to previous models.

title: TFDM: Time-Variant Frequency-Based Point Cloud Diffusion with Mamba
figure: First point cloud generation method using time-variant frequency-based diffusion with Mamba.
abstract: The paper presents TFDM, a novel diffusion framework for 3D point cloud generation that utilizes a dual latent Mamba block and a time-variant frequency encoder. This approach enhances detail quality while reducing computational overhead, achieving state-of-the-art performance on the ShapeNet-v2 dataset.

title: PASTA: Part-Aware Sketch-to-3D Shape Generation with Text-Aligned Prior
figure: First part-aware sketch-to-3D shape generator that integrates text-aligned priors via graph convolutional networks.
abstract: PASTA addresses the challenge of conditional 3D shape generation by combining user sketches with text descriptions to enhance shape control. It utilizes text embeddings to improve the semantic representation of sketches and introduces ISG-Net, which employs graph convolutional networks for detailed part-level editing. The method shows superior performance in sketch-to-3D generation compared to exi

title: VRsketch2Gaussian: 3D VR Sketch Guided 3D Object Generation with Gaussian Splatting
figure: First VR sketch-guided 3D object generation framework using Gaussian Splatting
abstract: VRsketch2Gaussian introduces a novel framework for 3D object generation guided by VR sketches, utilizing a 3D Gaussian Splatting representation. It features a large-scale dataset of paired VR sketches, text, and images, and employs a two-stage alignment strategy for effective multi-modal conditioning. The method achieves efficient and high-fidelity 3D object synthesis, demonstrating its potential

title: DDPM-Polycube: A Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model for Polycube-Based Hexahedral Mesh Generation and Volumetric Spline Construction
figure: First polycube-based hexahedral mesh generation using denoising diffusion models.
abstract: DDPM-Polycube introduces a generative approach for creating polycube structures and hexahedral meshes using denoising diffusion probabilistic models. It learns to deform input geometries into polycube structures by removing noise, enabling the generation of high-quality meshes and volumetric splines. The model demonstrates adaptability to diverse geometries, showcasing the potential of diffusion m

title: DecompDreamer: A Composition-Aware Curriculum for Structured 3D Asset Generation
figure: First method that addresses compositional 3D asset generation via staged optimization.
abstract: DecompDreamer introduces a novel framework for structured 3D asset generation that improves upon existing text-to-3D methods by addressing compositional prompts. It employs a staged optimization strategy to manage inter-object relationships and refine individual components, leading to enhanced fidelity and spatial coherence in generated assets.

title: TreeMeshGPT: Artistic Mesh Generation with Autoregressive Tree Sequencing
figure: First autoregressive model for artistic mesh generation using dynamic tree sequencing.
abstract: TreeMeshGPT is an autoregressive Transformer that generates high-quality artistic meshes from point clouds. It introduces a novel Autoregressive Tree Sequencing method, allowing local mesh extension and improving quality. The model achieves efficient tokenization and enhances mesh detail and normal orientation consistency, outperforming previous methods.

title: PBR3DGen: A VLM-guided Mesh Generation with High-quality PBR Texture
figure: First mesh generation method that integrates VLM-guided multi-view PBR material estimation.
abstract: PBR3DGen is a two-stage method for generating high-quality meshes with PBR materials, utilizing vision language models to guide multi-view diffusion. It addresses challenges in material and lighting interactions, enhancing spatially varying properties. Experimental results show it achieves state-of-the-art performance in PBR estimation and mesh generation.

title: Hyper3D: Efficient 3D Representation via Hybrid Triplane and Octree Feature for Enhanced 3D Shape Variational Auto-Encoders
figure: First efficient 3D representation via hybrid triplane and octree features for VAEs
abstract: Hyper3D introduces an efficient 3D representation that combines hybrid triplane and octree features to enhance VAE reconstruction. This approach addresses the challenges of geometric detail loss in existing 3D shape VAEs by embedding mesh information and integrating high-resolution triplanes with low-resolution grids, resulting in improved fidelity in 3D shape generation.

title: RewardSDS: Aligning Score Distillation via Reward-Weighted Sampling
figure: First approach to align score distillation via reward-weighted sampling for text-to-3D generation.
abstract: RewardSDS enhances Score Distillation Sampling (SDS) by introducing a reward model to weight noise samples, improving alignment to user intent in text-to-3D generation. The method shows significant performance improvements over existing SDS and VSD techniques across various metrics. A project page is available for further details.

title: PointNSP: Autoregressive 3D Point Cloud Generation with Next-Scale Level-of-Detail Prediction
figure: First autoregressive model for 3D point cloud generation with next-scale level-of-detail prediction.
abstract: PointNSP introduces a coarse-to-fine generative framework for autoregressive point cloud generation, addressing the limitations of traditional models by preserving global shape structure and refining geometry at higher scales. It achieves state-of-the-art generation quality and efficiency, outperforming diffusion-based methods, particularly in dense generation scenarios.

title: Representing 3D Shapes With 64 Latent Vectors for 3D Diffusion Models
figure: First efficient 3D diffusion model using a compact set of latent vectors via VAE
abstract: This paper presents COD-VAE, a method for encoding 3D shapes into a compact set of latent vectors using a two-stage autoencoder. It improves compression and decoding efficiency, achieving significant speedup in generation while maintaining quality. The method demonstrates 16x compression and 20.8x speedup compared to the baseline, with code available at the provided GitHub link.

title: Direct Flow Simulations with Implicit Neural Representation of Complex Geometry
figure: First framework that integrates implicit neural representations with shifted boundary methods for fluid flow simulations.
abstract: This paper presents a framework that couples implicit neural representations (INRs) with shifted boundary methods (SBM) to perform fluid flow simulations without generating intermediate meshes. The approach computes surrogate boundaries directly from the INR, demonstrating high-fidelity simulations on various geometries, including complex shapes, while bypassing traditional geometry processing.

title: DirectTriGS: Triplane-based Gaussian Splatting Field Representation for 3D Generation
figure: First framework that generates 3D objects using Gaussian Splatting via triplane representation.
abstract: DirectTriGS introduces a framework for generating 3D objects using Gaussian Splatting, addressing challenges in representing complex data structures. By employing a triplane representation, it encodes geometry and texture, enabling smooth transformations and high-quality rendering. The framework utilizes a Variational Autoencoder for compression and latent diffusion for 3D object generation, demon

title: A Mesh Is Worth 512 Numbers: Spectral-domain Diffusion Modeling for High-dimension Shape Generation
figure: First spectral-domain diffusion model for high-quality shape generation via SVD.
abstract: This paper presents SpoDify, a novel framework for high-quality shape generation using spectral-domain diffusion. By employing singular value decomposition (SVD) for shape encoding, it efficiently encodes complex meshes into continuous implicit representations, enabling high-quality mesh generation even with limited samples or GPU resources.

title: Text-to-3D Generation using Jensen-Shannon Score Distillation
figure: First text-to-3D generation method using Jensen-Shannon score distillation.
abstract: This paper presents a method for generating 3D models from text prompts using score distillation sampling. It addresses issues of over-saturation and limited diversity in generated assets by introducing a bounded score distillation objective based on Jensen-Shannon divergence, which stabilizes optimization and enhances the quality of 3D generation.

title: GSV3D: Gaussian Splatting-based Geometric Distillation with Stable Video Diffusion for Single-Image 3D Object Generation
figure: First method that combines Gaussian splatting with 2D diffusion for single-image 3D object generation.
abstract: GSV3D introduces a novel approach for single-image 3D object generation by integrating Gaussian splatting with 2D diffusion models. This method ensures 3D consistency and high-quality outputs by transforming latent outputs into explicit 3D representations, addressing limitations in existing models. The results show improved multi-view consistency and generalization across datasets, with code to be

title: Distilling Dataset into Neural Field
figure: First dataset distillation method that utilizes neural fields for shape generation.
abstract: This paper introduces DDiF, a novel framework for dataset distillation that uses neural fields to compress large-scale datasets into smaller synthetic datasets while preserving essential information. DDiF demonstrates superior expressiveness and performance across various domains, including 3D voxel data, and the code is available at the provided GitHub link.

title: ArcPro: Architectural Programs for Structured 3D Abstraction of Sparse Points
figure: First framework that recovers structured 3D abstractions from sparse point clouds via architectural programs.
abstract: ArcPro is a learning framework that recovers structured 3D abstractions from sparse point clouds using a domain-specific language to represent building structures. It employs a feedforward process for training data synthesis and an encoder-decoder architecture to map point clouds to architectural programs, enabling efficient inference and high-quality 3D outputs.

title: Morpheus: Text-Driven 3D Gaussian Splat Shape and Color Stylization
figure: First 3D Gaussian Splatting method for shape and color stylization via RGBD diffusion.
abstract: Morpheus introduces a novel autoregressive 3D Gaussian Splatting method for stylizing geometry and appearance in real-world spaces. It features a new RGBD diffusion model that allows for controlled strength in shape and style changes, ensuring consistency across frames through advanced techniques. The method is validated through qualitative and quantitative assessments, along with a user study.

title: MeshPad: Interactive Sketch-Conditioned Artist-Reminiscent Mesh Generation and Editing
figure: First interactive sketch-conditioned mesh generation and editing approach via a Transformer model
abstract: MeshPad is a generative method for creating 3D meshes from sketches, allowing for interactive editing through mesh region deletion and addition. It utilizes a triangle sequence-based representation and a Transformer model to enhance mesh quality and speed up the editing process. Experiments show significant improvements over existing methods.

title: GaussianSeal: Rooting Adaptive Watermarks for 3D Gaussian Generation Model
figure: First watermarking framework for 3D Gaussian Splatting generative models via adaptive bit modulation.
abstract: GaussianSeal introduces a novel bit watermarking framework for 3D Gaussian Splatting generative models, addressing copyright protection in 3D object generation. The method embeds adaptive bit modulation into the generative model, allowing for high-precision bit decoding while preserving output quality. Experiments show it outperforms traditional post-processing watermarking techniques.

title: CADDreamer: CAD Object Generation from Single-view Images
figure: First CAD object generation from single-view images via a primitive-aware multi-view diffusion model
abstract: CADDreamer introduces a novel approach for generating boundary representations of CAD objects from single images, addressing the limitations of existing 3D generative models. It employs a multi-view diffusion model that captures geometric details and structural semantics, resulting in high-quality, compact, and well-defined CAD models. The method includes geometric optimization techniques to enhan

title: Text2VDM: Text to Vector Displacement Maps for Expressive and Interactive 3D Sculpting
figure: First framework for text-to-vector displacement map generation via score distillation sampling.
abstract: Text2VDM introduces a novel framework for generating vector displacement maps (VDMs) from text, aimed at creating reusable sculpting brushes for 3D asset creation. By addressing semantic coupling in brush generation, the method enhances the accuracy of generated sub-object structures, allowing for seamless integration into modeling software for various applications.

title: GenPC: Zero-shot Point Cloud Completion via 3D Generative Priors
figure: First zero-shot point cloud completion method leveraging 3D generative priors via feed-forward models
abstract: GenPC introduces a zero-shot point cloud completion framework that utilizes 3D generative priors to reconstruct high-quality real-world scans. It employs a Depth Prompting module to connect partial point clouds with image-to-3D generative models and a Geometric Preserving Fusion module to maintain the original structure. Experiments demonstrate its effectiveness and generalizability.

title: Dragen3D: Multiview Geometry Consistent 3D Gaussian Generation with Drag-Based Control
figure: First geometrically controllable 3D Gaussian generation and editing via Anchor-GS VAE
abstract: Dragen3D addresses challenges in single-image 3D generation by introducing a method that ensures multi-view geometric consistency and controllability. It utilizes a novel Anchor-GS VAE to encode point clouds and images into latents, allowing for efficient 3D Gaussian generation. The Seed-Point-Driven strategy enables users to intuitively manipulate the generated geometry, achieving high-quality re

title: Mean-Shift Distillation for Diffusion Mode Seeking
figure: First mean-shift distillation technique for improved diffusion mode seeking in text-to-3D applications
abstract: This paper introduces mean-shift distillation, a technique that enhances diffusion sampling by aligning with modes of the output distribution. It serves as a replacement for score distillation sampling, improving convergence and fidelity in both text-to-image and text-to-3D tasks.

title: Textured 3D Regenerative Morphing with 3D Diffusion Prior
figure: First method for textured 3D morphing using a 3D diffusion prior
abstract: This paper presents a novel approach for textured 3D morphing that utilizes a 3D diffusion model to create smooth transitions between 3D objects without the need for explicit correspondences. The method enhances the quality of generated surfaces through strategies like Token Reordering and Low-Frequency Enhancement, achieving superior results in morphing across diverse object categories.

title: Pandora3D: A Comprehensive Framework for High-Quality 3D Shape and Texture Generation
figure: First comprehensive framework for high-quality 3D shape and texture generation via VAE and diffusion.
abstract: Pandora3D introduces a framework for generating high-quality 3D shapes and textures from various input prompts, utilizing a VAE for shape generation and a multi-stage process for texture generation. The system effectively handles diverse input formats and integrates advanced neural architectures to produce high-quality 3D content.

title: RecDreamer: Consistent Text-to-3D Generation via Uniform Score Distillation
figure: First text-to-3D generation method that addresses pose consistency via uniform score distillation.
abstract: RecDreamer tackles the Multi-Face Janus problem in text-to-3D generation by reshaping the data distribution for consistent pose representation. It introduces uniform score distillation to eliminate biases in pose variation, ensuring a uniform distribution across poses. The method enhances existing algorithms and demonstrates improved performance in generating 3D assets across different poses.

title: Diverse Topology Optimization using Modulated Neural Fields
figure: First topology optimization method that generates diverse geometries via modulated neural fields.
abstract: The paper presents Topology Optimization using Modulated Neural Fields (TOM), a method that generates diverse, structurally compliant shapes without relying on datasets. By incorporating a solver-in-the-loop, TOM explores alternative designs while maintaining near-optimality. The results demonstrate its effectiveness in both 2D and 3D topology optimization, paving the way for innovative engineerin

title: Syllables to Scenes: Literary-Guided Free-Viewpoint 3D Scene Synthesis from Japanese Haiku
figure: First framework that synthesizes 3D scenes from Japanese Haiku via literary-guided generative processes
abstract: HaikuVerse is a novel framework that transforms Japanese Haiku into navigable 3D environments, addressing the challenge of preserving semantic and emotional fidelity. It combines literary analysis with generative technologies through hierarchical parsing and a multi-stage synthesis process, outperforming existing text-to-3D methods in fidelity and visual quality.

title: MARS: Mesh AutoRegressive Model for 3D Shape Detailization
figure: First mesh autoregressive model for 3D shape detailization across multiple categories and LODs
abstract: MARS introduces a novel approach for 3D shape detailization using a multi-LOD, multi-category mesh representation. It employs an autoregressive model to generate shape-consistent latent representations, enhancing realism and detail while maintaining shape integrity. The model outperforms existing methods on the 3D Shape Detailization benchmark.

title: ConsistentDreamer: View-Consistent Meshes Through Balanced Multi-View Gaussian Optimization
figure: First method ensuring view-consistent meshes via balanced multi-view Gaussian optimization.
abstract: ConsistentDreamer addresses the challenges of inconsistent content in image-to-3D generation by generating fixed multi-view prior images and sampling random views through a score distillation sampling loss. This approach balances rough shape and fine-detail optimizations, improving view consistency and visual quality in mesh extraction compared to existing methods.

title: DreamLLM-3D: Affective Dream Reliving using Large Language Model and 3D Generative AI
figure: First system that integrates LLM with text-to-3D generative AI for immersive dream reliving.
abstract: DreamLLM-3D is a multimodal AI system designed for immersive dream reliving, combining a Large Language Model with text-to-3D generative AI. It analyzes dream reports to visualize key entities as dynamic 3D point clouds, influenced by emotional data. This approach aims to enhance the emotional engagement and creativity in the dream experience.

title: ShapeLib: Designing a library of programmatic 3D shape abstractions with Large Language Models
figure: First method that uses LLMs to design libraries of programmatic 3D shape abstractions.
abstract: ShapeLib leverages Large Language Models to create libraries of programmatic 3D shape abstractions based on user-defined design intents. It combines high-level text descriptions and exemplar shapes to generate abstractions that generalize across shape distributions. The framework supports shape editing and generation workflows, demonstrating advantages in usability and generalization over previous

title: TripoSG: High-Fidelity 3D Shape Synthesis using Large-Scale Rectified Flow Models
figure: First high-fidelity 3D shape synthesis using large-scale rectified flow models via diffusion.
abstract: TripoSG introduces a new shape diffusion paradigm for generating high-fidelity 3D meshes that correspond precisely to input images. It utilizes a large-scale rectified flow transformer and a hybrid supervised training strategy, achieving state-of-the-art performance in 3D shape generation. The model demonstrates enhanced detail and versatility across diverse image styles, with plans for public rel

title: DreamDPO: Aligning Text-to-3D Generation with Human Preferences via Direct Preference Optimization
figure: First text-to-3D generation method that aligns with human preferences via direct preference optimization.
abstract: DreamDPO is a framework for text-to-3D generation that incorporates human preferences into the 3D content creation process. It uses pairwise comparisons to optimize 3D representations with a preference-driven loss function, enhancing the quality and controllability of generated content. Experiments show that it outperforms existing methods, and the code will be open-sourced.

title: ShapeShifter: 3D Variations Using Multiscale and Sparse Point-Voxel Diffusion
figure: First 3D generative model that synthesizes shape variations using multiscale and sparse point-voxel diffusion.
abstract: ShapeShifter introduces a 3D generative model that efficiently synthesizes shape variations from a single reference model. By integrating sparse voxel grids and point sampling within a multiscale architecture, it captures fine geometric details and supports interactive generation of 3D shape variants, enhancing user control in design.

title: LAYOUTDREAMER: Physics-guided Layout for Text-to-3D Compositional Scene Generation
figure: First framework for text-to-3D compositional scene generation using 3D Gaussian Splatting.
abstract: LayoutDreamer is a framework for generating high-quality, physically consistent 3D scenes from text prompts. It addresses challenges in capturing complex relationships between objects and ensuring realistic layouts by using directed scene graphs and adaptive density adjustments. The method shows state-of-the-art performance in generating multiple objects.

title: UVGS: Reimagining Unstructured 3D Gaussian Splatting using UV Mapping
figure: First method to generate 3D Gaussian Splatting via UV mapping and diffusion models
abstract: The paper presents UVGS, a method that transforms unstructured 3D Gaussian Splatting into a structured 2D representation, enabling the use of 2D generative models for 3D generation. It demonstrates various applications of unconditional and conditional generation of 3DGS using diffusion models, addressing challenges in modeling 3D objects and scenes.

title: PhiP-G: Physics-Guided Text-to-3D Compositional Scene Generation
figure: First physics-guided text-to-3D compositional scene generation via a world model.
abstract: PhiP-G is a novel framework for generating compositional scenes from text, addressing challenges in layout compliance with physical laws and asset generation. It integrates LLM-based scene graph analysis with multimodal 2D and 3D Gaussian generation methods, enhancing scene quality and physical rationality. Extensive experiments show PhiP-G achieves state-of-the-art performance in generation quali

title: Shape from Semantics: 3D Shape Generation from Multi-View Semantics
figure: First 3D shape generation from multi-view semantics via Local Geometry-Aware Distillation
abstract: This paper introduces a novel task called 'Shape from Semantics' for generating 3D models that align with given text semantics from multiple views. It employs generative models and a strategy called Local Geometry-Aware Distillation to create detailed geometries and textures, resulting in visually appealing 3D designs. The method ensures realistic shape generation and smooth transitions across vie

title: DiffSplat: Repurposing Image Diffusion Models for Scalable Gaussian Splat Generation
figure: First framework that generates 3D Gaussian splats via image diffusion models.
abstract: DiffSplat is a novel 3D generative framework that generates 3D Gaussian splats by leveraging large-scale text-to-image diffusion models. It maintains 3D consistency while utilizing web-scale 2D priors, introducing a reconstruction model for scalable dataset curation and a 3D rendering loss for coherence across views. The framework excels in text- and image-conditioned generation tasks.

title: Nautilus: Locality-aware Autoencoder for Scalable Mesh Generation
figure: First locality-aware autoencoder for scalable mesh generation via novel tokenization and dual-stream conditioning.
abstract: Nautilus is a locality-aware autoencoder designed for scalable mesh generation, addressing limitations in existing methods. It introduces a novel tokenization algorithm to maintain face proximity and compress sequence length, allowing for the generation of meshes with up to 5,000 faces. The method also features a Dual-stream Point Conditioner for enhanced geometric guidance, significantly improvin

title: MultiDreamer3D: Multi-concept 3D Customization with Concept-Aware Diffusion Guidance
figure: First method for multi-concept 3D customization via concept-aware diffusion guidance
abstract: MultiDreamer3D introduces a novel approach for generating coherent multi-concept 3D content. It utilizes an LLM-based layout controller to create 3D bounding boxes and a selective point cloud generator for each concept. The method refines 3D Gaussians through concept-aware interval score matching, ensuring distinct identities and handling complex interactions.

title: Orchid: Image Latent Diffusion for Joint Appearance and Geometry Generation
figure: First unified latent diffusion model for joint appearance and geometry generation via VAE.
abstract: Orchid is a latent diffusion model that generates color, depth, and surface normal images in a single process, improving efficiency and coherence over separate models. It supports text-based generation and joint estimation of depth and normals, while also enabling inpainting of large 3D regions. Experiments show it outperforms existing methods in geometry prediction tasks.

title: Hunyuan3D 2.0: Scaling Diffusion Models for High Resolution Textured 3D Assets Generation
figure: First large-scale 3D synthesis system for high-resolution textured assets via flow-based diffusion.
abstract: Hunyuan3D 2.0 is a large-scale system for generating high-resolution textured 3D assets, featuring a shape generation model and a texture synthesis model. It allows users to create geometry aligned with condition images and produces vibrant texture maps. The system outperforms previous models in geometry details and texture quality, and is publicly available to support the open-source 3D community

title: CaPa: Carve-n-Paint Synthesis for Efficient 4K Textured Mesh Generation
figure: First high-fidelity 3D asset generator using a carve-and-paint framework via latent diffusion.
abstract: CaPa introduces a two-stage carve-and-paint framework for generating high-quality 3D assets from multi-view inputs. It separates geometry generation from texture synthesis, ensuring structural consistency and high-resolution textures. The method achieves fast generation times and addresses common challenges in 3D modeling, setting a new standard for scalable asset creation.

title: Compositional Generative Model of Unbounded 4D Cities
figure: First model that generates unbounded 4D cities using compositional generative techniques.
abstract: CityDreamer4D is a compositional generative model designed for generating unbounded 4D cities, addressing the complexities of dynamic and static objects. It separates dynamic elements like vehicles from static structures such as buildings, utilizing neural fields for various object types. The model supports instance editing and urban simulation, backed by comprehensive datasets for city generation

title: F3D-Gaus: Feed-forward 3D-aware Generation on ImageNet with Cycle-Aggregative Gaussian Splatting
figure: First feed-forward pipeline for 3D-aware generation from monocular datasets via Gaussian Splatting
abstract: F3D-Gaus addresses the challenge of generalizable 3D-aware generation from monocular datasets like ImageNet. It introduces a feed-forward pipeline using pixel-aligned Gaussian Splatting to enhance the quality of 3D renderings. The method incorporates a self-supervised cycle-aggregative constraint for cross-view consistency and utilizes video model priors for geometry-aware refinement, achieving hi

title: Consistent Flow Distillation for Text-to-3D Generation
figure: First method to improve text-to-3D generation via consistent flow distillation.
abstract: This paper introduces Consistent Flow Distillation (CFD) to enhance text-to-3D generation by addressing the limitations of Score Distillation Sampling. By leveraging gradient-based sampling and multi-view consistent Gaussian noise, CFD improves visual quality and diversity in 3D outputs, outperforming previous methods.

title: Zero-1-to-G: Taming Pretrained 2D Diffusion Model for Direct 3D Generation
figure: First direct image-to-3D generative model utilizing pretrained 2D diffusion priors
abstract: Zero-1-to-G introduces a novel method for direct 3D generation using pretrained 2D diffusion models, leveraging Gaussian splats as a 3D representation. The approach incorporates cross-view and cross-attribute attention layers to ensure 3D consistency, demonstrating superior performance in generating 3D objects from single-view images.

title: Instructive3D: Editing Large Reconstruction Models with Text Instructions
figure: First model that integrates generation and fine-grained editing of 3D objects via text prompts.
abstract: Instructive3D is a novel model that combines the generation and fine-grained editing of 3D objects using text prompts. It enhances Large Reconstruction Models by allowing users to manipulate details like design patterns and colors in the triplane latent space, resulting in geometrically consistent modifications without needing to generate edited 3D objects.

title: Chirpy3D: Part-Aware Multi-View Diffusion for Creative Fine-Grained Object Generation
figure: First part-aware multi-view diffusion framework for fine-grained object generation.
abstract: Chirpy3D introduces a part-aware multi-view diffusion framework that generates fine-grained object structures from 2D images without 3D data. It learns a hierarchical part latent space for intuitive part-level manipulation and supports coherent generation across views. The method emphasizes flexibility in creative object generation and is backed by a self-supervised feature consistency loss. Code

title: Layout2Scene: 3D Semantic Layout Guided Scene Generation via Geometry and Appearance Diffusion Priors
figure: First text-to-scene generation method using semantic layout for precise object positioning via diffusion.
abstract: Layout2Scene introduces a method for 3D scene generation that utilizes semantic layouts to enhance control over object placement. By employing a hybrid representation and a two-stage optimization process, the approach leverages 2D diffusion models to improve the realism of generated scenes. The method allows for flexible editing and demonstrates superior performance compared to existing techniques

title: Taming Feed-forward Reconstruction Models as Latent Encoders for 3D Generative Models
figure: First to use feed-forward reconstruction models as latent encoders for 3D generative models via flow-based training.
abstract: This paper presents a method that utilizes feed-forward image-to-3D reconstruction models as latent encoders for training 3D generative models. By leveraging pre-trained reconstruction models, the authors enhance the efficiency and performance of text-conditioned 3D generation while addressing the challenges of unstructured latent spaces.

title: Prometheus: 3D-Aware Latent Diffusion Models for Feed-Forward Text-to-3D Scene Generation
figure: First 3D-aware latent diffusion model for feed-forward text-to-3D scene generation.
abstract: Prometheus is a 3D-aware latent diffusion model designed for rapid text-to-3D generation of both objects and scenes. It utilizes multi-view, feed-forward, pixel-aligned 3D Gaussian generation within the latent diffusion framework, enhancing generalizability and fidelity by incorporating RGB-D latent space. The method shows significant effectiveness in generating 3D Gaussians and scenes.

title: Toward Scene Graph and Layout Guided Complex 3D Scene Generation
figure: First framework that generates complex 3D scenes guided by scene graphs and layouts via SDS
abstract: GraLa3D addresses the challenge of generating complex 3D scenes by utilizing a scene graph representation and layout bounding box information. It models interactions between objects and constrains generation within a specified layout, resulting in scenes that align closely with text prompts.

title: Sharpening Neural Implicit Functions with Frequency Consolidation Priors
figure: First method to sharpen low frequency SDFs using frequency consolidation priors.
abstract: This paper presents a method to enhance Signed Distance Functions (SDFs) by recovering high frequency components from low frequency observations. The approach introduces frequency consolidation priors to improve the representation of sharp structures in 3D surfaces, demonstrating superior performance on benchmarks and real scenes. The code and models are publicly available.

title: Multi-scale Latent Point Consistency Models for 3D Shape Generation
figure: First multi-scale latent point consistency model for 3D shape generation via latent diffusion.
abstract: The paper introduces the Multi-scale Latent Point Consistency Model (MLPCM) for point-cloud-based 3D shape generation, enhancing sampling efficiency and shape quality through a novel latent diffusion framework. It employs hierarchical latent representations and a multi-scale integration module, achieving significant speedup and improved performance on standard benchmarks.

title: PartGen: Part-level 3D Generation and Reconstruction with Multi-View Diffusion Models
figure: First method to generate 3D objects composed of meaningful parts via multi-view diffusion models
abstract: PartGen introduces a novel approach for generating 3D objects made of meaningful parts from text, images, or unstructured 3D objects. It utilizes multi-view diffusion models to extract plausible part segmentations and reconstructs the 3D object by filling occlusions and ensuring cohesive integration of parts. The method shows significant improvements over existing baselines and supports applicatio

title: ArchComplete: Autoregressive 3D Architectural Design Generation with Hierarchical Diffusion-Based Upsampling
figure: First autoregressive 3D architectural design generator with hierarchical diffusion-based upsampling
abstract: ArchComplete is a two-stage voxel-based 3D generative pipeline that uses an autoregressive transformer to generate coarse architectural shapes, followed by a hierarchical upsampling strategy for fine details. It learns from a dataset of 3D house models and can perform tasks like unconditional synthesis and geometric detailization, achieving state-of-the-art results in quality and efficiency.

title: GaussianPainter: Painting Point Cloud into 3D Gaussians with Normal Guidance
figure: First method to paint point clouds into 3D Gaussians via a feed-forward approach
abstract: GaussianPainter introduces a novel method to convert point clouds into 3D Gaussians using a reference image. It employs a feed-forward approach to address challenges in 3D Gaussian splatting, particularly the non-uniqueness problem. By estimating surface normals for each point, the method effectively predicts Gaussian parameters, achieving high-quality and diverse 3D content creation efficiently.

title: S-INF: Towards Realistic Indoor Scene Synthesis via Scene Implicit Neural Field
figure: First method for realistic indoor scene synthesis via Scene Implicit Neural Field.
abstract: This paper presents S-INF, a method for realistic indoor scene synthesis that learns meaningful representations of multimodal relationships. By disentangling scene layout and object relationships and using implicit neural fields, S-INF enhances the realism of generated indoor scenes. Extensive experiments show state-of-the-art performance on the 3D-FRONT dataset.

title: TAR3D: Creating High-Quality 3D Assets via Next-Part Prediction
figure: First framework that generates high-quality 3D assets via next-part prediction using VQ-VAE and GPT.
abstract: TAR3D introduces a framework combining a 3D-aware VQ-VAE and a Generative Pre-trained Transformer for generating high-quality 3D assets. It encodes 3D shapes into a triplane latent space and predicts codebook index sequences autoregressively, achieving superior generation quality in text-to-3D and image-to-3D tasks compared to existing methods.

title: ExCellGen: Fast, Controllable, Photorealistic 3D Scene Generation from a Single Real-World Exemplar
figure: First fast, exemplar-driven framework for photorealistic 3D scene generation from a single input via GCA.
abstract: ExCellGen introduces a fast framework for generating photorealistic 3D scenes from a single casual input, such as video or drone footage. It utilizes 3D Gaussian Splatting for scene reconstruction and a Generative Cellular Automaton to create a sparse volume of voxels, allowing for rapid and controllable scene generation. The method enables interactive creation and showcases complex results from r

title: GCA-3D: Towards Generalized and Consistent Domain Adaptation of 3D Generators
figure: First generalized 3D domain adaptation method using multi-modal depth-aware score distillation.
abstract: GCA-3D addresses the challenges of 3D generative domain adaptation by introducing a method that avoids the complex data generation pipeline. It utilizes a multi-modal depth-aware score distillation loss for efficient adaptation of 3D models, supporting both text and one-shot image prompts. The method enhances pose and identity consistency, outperforming previous approaches in efficiency and accura

title: MeshArt: Generating Articulated Meshes with Structure-Guided Transformers
figure: First articulated mesh generator using structure-guided transformers.
abstract: MeshArt introduces a hierarchical transformer-based method for generating articulated 3D meshes. It operates in two stages: first generating a high-level structure and then synthesizing mesh faces for each part. The approach utilizes quantized triangle embeddings and structure-guided conditioning to ensure coherence among parts, achieving significant improvements in structure coverage and mesh gen

title: How to Spin an Object: First, Get the Shape Right
figure: First framework for empirical analysis of image-to-3D pipelines using CROCS for direct point cloud generation
abstract: The paper introduces unPIC, a modular framework for analyzing image-to-3D generation processes. It emphasizes the importance of intermediate geometric representations, particularly Camera-Relative Object Coordinates (CROCS), which enhances the generation of 3D point clouds and improves novel-view quality and geometric accuracy. The framework allows for rigorous comparisons and demonstrates superio

title: GT23D-Bench: A Comprehensive General Text-to-3D Generation Benchmark
figure: First comprehensive benchmark for General Text-to-3D generation.
abstract: GT23D-Bench is a benchmark for General Text-to-3D generation, addressing challenges in training data quality and evaluation metrics. It includes a dataset of 400K 3D assets and a suite of 10 metrics for assessing text-3D alignment and visual quality. The benchmark aims to enhance the efficiency and generalization of 3D content generation from text.

title: Meshtron: High-Fidelity, Artist-Like 3D Mesh Generation at Scale
figure: First autoregressive model that generates high-fidelity meshes with up to 64K faces.
abstract: Meshtron is an autoregressive model designed for generating high-quality 3D meshes, capable of producing up to 64K faces at a 1024-level coordinate resolution. It improves upon existing methods by enhancing scalability and efficiency, resulting in meshes that closely resemble those crafted by professional artists, suitable for animation and gaming.

title: MS2Mesh-XR: Multi-modal Sketch-to-Mesh Generation in XR Environments
figure: First multi-modal sketch-to-mesh generation pipeline in XR environments using voice inputs.
abstract: MS2Mesh-XR is a novel pipeline that allows users to create realistic 3D objects in XR environments through hand-drawn sketches and voice inputs. It integrates ControlNet to generate images from sketches and text prompts, which are then reconstructed into detailed 3D meshes. The system enables high-quality mesh generation in under 20 seconds, enhancing creative production in XR settings.

title: DSplats: 3D Generation by Denoising Splats-Based Multiview Diffusion Models
figure: First method that generates diverse 3D assets by denoising multiview images using Gaussian Splat-based Reconstructors.
abstract: DSplats introduces a novel approach to generate high-quality 3D content by denoising multiview images with Gaussian Splat-based Reconstructors. By integrating a pretrained Latent Diffusion Model, it enhances the expressiveness and consistency of 3D outputs, achieving significant improvements in quality and spatial consistency over previous methods.

title: LOGen: Toward Lidar Object Generation by Point Diffusion
figure: First LiDAR object generation model using point diffusion.
abstract: LOGen introduces a novel diffusion-based model for generating LiDAR point clouds of 3D objects, focusing on enhancing the quality of LiDAR scan generation. The model allows extensive control through conditioning information and demonstrates effectiveness on datasets like nuScenes and KITTI-360, evaluated with new 3D metrics tailored for LiDAR objects.

title: ArtFormer: Controllable Generation of Diverse 3D Articulated Objects
figure: First framework for controllable generation of diverse 3D articulated objects via transformer.
abstract: ArtFormer introduces a framework for modeling and generating 3D articulated objects, addressing flexibility-quality tradeoffs. By parameterizing objects as a tree of tokens and using a transformer, it generates high-level geometry and kinematic relations. The method employs SDF shape priors for high-quality shape synthesis, enabling diverse object generation from text descriptions.

title: Tactile DreamFusion: Exploiting Tactile Sensing for 3D Generation
figure: First method that leverages high-resolution tactile sensing to enhance geometric details for 3D generation tasks via diffusion.
abstract: This paper presents a novel approach to 3D generation that incorporates tactile sensing to improve geometric details. By using a lightweight 3D texture field and conditioning on tactile normals, the method enhances visual and tactile textures in both text-to-3D and image-to-3D settings. The results show improved alignment between vision and touch, providing realistic fine geometric textures.

title: Diverse Score Distillation
figure: First score distillation method that enhances diversity in 3D generation via random initial seeds.
abstract: This paper introduces Diverse Score Distillation (DSD), a method that improves the diversity of 3D outputs from score distillation of 2D diffusion models. By guiding optimization along generation paths defined by random seeds, DSD enhances sample diversity while maintaining fidelity. The method is validated across various tasks, including text-based 3D inference and single-view reconstruction, sho

title: You See it, You Got it: Learning 3D Creation on Pose-Free Videos at Scale
figure: First visual-conditional multi-view diffusion model for open-world 3D creation from videos
abstract: See3D is a novel 3D generation model that leverages large-scale Internet videos to create 3D content without requiring explicit 3D geometry or camera pose annotations. It introduces a visual-condition based on 2D signals and integrates into a warping-based pipeline for high-fidelity 3D generation, achieving significant performance improvements over traditional methods.

title: Text-to-3D Generation by 2D Editing
figure: First method that distills 3D representations from 2D diffusion models via editing.
abstract: This paper presents GE3D, a novel method for generating photorealistic 3D outputs by distilling information from pretrained 2D diffusion models through a 2D editing framework. It addresses inefficiencies in current methods and optimizes the process by aligning latents across noising and denoising trajectories. The approach enhances 3D generation technology and connects it with 2D editing, with cod

title: Text-to-3D Gaussian Splatting with Physics-Grounded Motion Generation
figure: First text-to-3D generation framework using LLM-refined prompts and diffusion-guided Gaussian Splatting for physics-aware motion.
abstract: This paper presents a framework for text-to-3D generation that combines LLM-refined prompts with diffusion-guided Gaussian Splatting to create high-fidelity 3D models. It also incorporates physics-grounded motion synthesis, ensuring realistic object behavior under various forces. The approach achieves photo-realistic 3D objects with accurate geometric structures and vivid motion.

title: DNF: Unconditional 4D Generation with Dictionary-based Neural Fields
figure: First unconditional 4D generation model that disentangles shape and motion via dictionary-based neural fields
abstract: DNF introduces a novel 4D representation for unconditional generative modeling, effectively capturing deformable shapes and their motion. By using a dictionary learning approach, it disentangles shape and motion while maintaining high fidelity. The method combines this representation with a transformer-based diffusion model to generate high-quality 4D animations.

title: Turbo3D: Ultra-fast Text-to-3D Generation
figure: First ultra-fast text-to-3D generation system using a 4-step diffusion generator.
abstract: Turbo3D is an ultra-fast text-to-3D system that generates high-quality Gaussian splatting assets in under one second. It utilizes a 4-step, 4-view diffusion generator and an efficient feed-forward Gaussian reconstructor, both in latent space, achieving superior results with reduced runtime compared to previous methods.

title: InfiniCube: Unbounded and Controllable Dynamic 3D Driving Scene Generation with World-Guided Video Models
figure: First method for unbounded dynamic 3D driving scene generation via voxel-based generative model.
abstract: InfiniCube introduces a scalable approach for generating unbounded dynamic 3D driving scenes, addressing limitations in previous methods regarding scale and consistency. By utilizing a map-conditioned sparse-voxel model and a video model, it achieves high fidelity and controllability in scene generation. The method allows for flexible controls through HD maps and text descriptions, validated by ex

title: MIDI: Multi-Instance Diffusion for Single Image to 3D Scene Generation
figure: First multi-instance diffusion model for single image to 3D scene generation.
abstract: MIDI is a novel approach for generating 3D scenes from a single image, utilizing multi-instance diffusion models to create multiple 3D instances with accurate spatial relationships. It incorporates a multi-instance attention mechanism to capture inter-object interactions and models object completion directly during generation. The method shows state-of-the-art performance in image-to-scene generat

title: Sharp-It: A Multi-view to Multi-view Diffusion Model for 3D Synthesis and Manipulation
figure: First multi-view to multi-view diffusion model that enhances 3D object quality.
abstract: Sharp-It introduces a multi-view to multi-view diffusion model that improves the quality of 3D objects by enriching geometric details and texture from low-quality multi-view images. This method combines the strengths of 2D and 3D approaches, enabling efficient and controllable high-quality 3D content creation, including synthesis and editing applications.

title: Improving Viewpoint Consistency in 3D Generation via Structure Feature and CLIP Guidance
figure: First method to improve viewpoint consistency in text-to-3D generation via ACG mechanism
abstract: This paper addresses the Janus Problem in text-to-3D generation, which arises from viewpoint generation bias in diffusion models. The proposed Attention and CLIP Guidance (ACG) mechanism enhances viewpoint consistency by controlling cross-attention maps and filtering erroneous viewpoints, leading to improved 3D model generation without sacrificing speed.

title: 3D representation in 512-Byte:Variational tokenizer is the key for autoregressive 3D generation
figure: First autoregressive 3D generation method using a variational tokenizer for efficient modeling
abstract: The paper introduces the Variational Tokenizer (VAT) for 3D generation, addressing the challenge of compressing unordered 3D data into discrete tokens. VAT enables high-fidelity autoregressive modeling by transforming 3D features into compact latent tokens, which are then decoded into detailed 3D shapes using a high-resolution triplane. The method demonstrates significant improvements in quality a

title: SceneFactor: Factored Latent 3D Diffusion for Controllable 3D Scene Generation
figure: First controllable 3D scene generation via factored latent diffusion.
abstract: SceneFactor introduces a diffusion-based method for generating large-scale 3D scenes with controllable editing capabilities. It utilizes a factored diffusion formulation to synthesize 3D scenes guided by text input, allowing for intuitive manipulation of semantic 3D proxy boxes for high-fidelity geometric editing.

title: Planning and Reasoning with 3D Deformable Objects for Hierarchical Text-to-3D Robotic Shaping
figure: First autonomous sculpting system for text-to-3D shaping without explicit 3D goals
abstract: This paper presents a novel approach to deformable object manipulation through a text-to-3D sculpting system. It introduces a coarse-to-fine method for sculpting clay into 3D shapes using language models for sub-goal generation and a point cloud action model. The system can create shapes based solely on text prompts, marking a significant advancement in autonomous sculpting.

title: 3DSceneEditor: Controllable 3D Scene Editing with Gaussian Splatting
figure: First interactive 3D scene editing method using Gaussian Splatting for precise control
abstract: 3DSceneEditor introduces a novel approach for interactive editing of complex 3D scenes using Gaussian Splatting, enhancing precision and efficiency compared to traditional methods. It integrates instance segmentation and zero-shot grounding with CLIP for semantic labeling and user prompt alignment, allowing for direct modifications to 3D scenes.

title: Structured 3D Latents for Scalable and Versatile 3D Generation
figure: First method to use Structured LATent representation for versatile 3D generation via rectified flow transformers.
abstract: This paper presents a new 3D generation method utilizing a Structured LATent (SLAT) representation for creating high-quality 3D assets. It integrates a 3D grid with multiview visual features, allowing for flexible decoding into various formats like meshes and Radiance Fields. The model, trained on a large dataset, excels in generating results conditioned on text or images and offers local 3D editi

title: A Lesson in Splats: Teacher-Guided Diffusion for 3D Gaussian Splats Generation with 2D Supervision
figure: First 3D Gaussian Splat generation using teacher-guided diffusion with 2D supervision
abstract: This paper introduces a framework for training 3D diffusion models using only 2D supervision, addressing the challenges of recovering 3D structure from 2D images. By decoupling the denoising process from the supervision signal, the method allows for effective 3D diffusion training without full 3D ground truth. The approach shows improvements over deterministic models in generating high-fidelity 3D

title: Instant3dit: Multiview Inpainting for Fast Editing of 3D Objects
figure: First fast 3D shape editing method via multiview inpainting
abstract: Instant3dit introduces a generative technique for rapid editing of 3D shapes, leveraging multiview image inpainting to achieve results in about 3 seconds. The method can handle various 3D representations and employs fine-tuning strategies for effective inpainting, significantly improving the speed and quality of 3D generative editing.

title: 3D-WAG: Hierarchical Wavelet-Guided Autoregressive Generation for High-Fidelity 3D Shapes
figure: First autoregressive model for high-fidelity 3D shape generation via hierarchical wavelet-guided approach
abstract: 3D-WAG introduces an autoregressive model for generating 3D implicit distance fields, enabling efficient and controllable shape generation. It encodes shapes as multi-scale wavelet token maps and predicts higher-resolution token maps, reducing computational costs while maintaining geometric details. The model supports unconditional, class-conditioned, and text-conditioned generation, outperforming

title: PCDreamer: Point Cloud Completion Through Multi-view Diffusion Priors
figure: First point cloud completion method using multi-view diffusion priors.
abstract: PCDreamer introduces a novel approach for point cloud completion by leveraging multi-view diffusion priors. It generates novel views from partial point clouds and images, enhancing shape recovery. The method includes a shape fusion module for initial shape creation and a consolidation module for refining the final output, demonstrating superior performance in detail recovery.

title: PhyCAGE: Physically Plausible Compositional 3D Asset Generation from a Single Image
figure: First approach for physically plausible compositional 3D asset generation from a single image via PSE-SDS.
abstract: PhyCAGE introduces a novel method for generating physically plausible 3D assets from a single image. It creates consistent multi-view images for asset components and utilizes 3D Gaussian Splatting. The method employs a Physical Simulation-Enhanced Score Distillation Sampling technique to optimize the positions of the Gaussians, ensuring physical compatibility among objects.

title: ModeDreamer: Mode Guiding Score Distillation for Text-to-3D Generation using Reference Image Prompts
figure: First text-to-3D generation method using mode guiding score distillation with reference images.
abstract: ModeDreamer introduces a novel image prompt score distillation loss to enhance text-to-3D generation quality. By directing optimization towards specific modes using reference images, it addresses issues of over-smoothing and instability in existing methods. The approach improves output quality and optimization speed, as validated by experiments on the T3Bench benchmark suite.

title: MARVEL-40M+: Multi-Level Visual Elaboration for High-Fidelity Text-to-3D Content Creation
figure: First extensive dataset with 40 million text annotations for high-fidelity text-to-3D generation via a novel multi-stage pipeline.
abstract: MARVEL-40M+ introduces a dataset with 40 million text annotations for 3D assets, enhancing text-to-3D generation. It features a multi-stage annotation pipeline that improves reconstruction and prototyping, and includes a two-stage text-to-3D pipeline that generates textured meshes quickly. Evaluations show significant improvements in annotation quality and diversity.

title: Symmetry Strikes Back: From Single-Image Symmetry Detection to 3D Generation
figure: First method that integrates symmetry detection into single-image 3D generation via a transformer-based architecture.
abstract: This paper presents Reflect3D, a method for detecting 3D reflection symmetry from a single RGB image, enhancing single-image 3D generation. By utilizing a transformer-based architecture and generative priors from multi-view diffusion models, it improves the structural accuracy and visual fidelity of reconstructed 3D geometry. Extensive evaluations show its effectiveness in diverse scenarios.

title: SAR3D: Autoregressive 3D Object Generation and Understanding via Multi-scale 3D VQVAE
figure: First autoregressive 3D object generation framework using multi-scale VQVAE.
abstract: SAR3D introduces a novel framework for 3D object generation using a multi-scale VQVAE, enabling efficient autoregressive generation and understanding of 3D objects. It significantly reduces generation time and improves quality, allowing for multimodal comprehension of 3D content.

title: SplatFlow: Multi-View Rectified Flow Model for 3D Gaussian Splatting Synthesis
figure: First unified framework for 3D Gaussian Splatting generation and editing via multi-view rectified flow.
abstract: SplatFlow introduces a unified framework for generating and editing 3D scenes using 3D Gaussian Splatting. It features a multi-view rectified flow model that generates images, depths, and camera poses from text prompts, and a decoder that translates these into 3D representations. The framework supports various 3D tasks, including object editing and novel view synthesis, demonstrating versatility a

title: Fancy123: One Image to High-Quality 3D Mesh Generation via Plug-and-Play Deformation
figure: First method to generate high-quality 3D meshes from a single image via plug-and-play deformation.
abstract: Fancy123 addresses the challenges of generating 3D meshes from a single image by introducing enhancement modules and an unprojection operation. It improves multiview consistency and mesh fidelity, resulting in high-quality outputs. The method integrates seamlessly with existing techniques and demonstrates state-of-the-art performance in experiments.

title: NovelGS: Consistent Novel-view Denoising via Large Gaussian Reconstruction Model
figure: First Gaussian reconstruction model that generates 3D objects via novel view denoising.
abstract: NovelGS is a diffusion model that generates 3D Gaussians from sparse-view images, addressing challenges in multi-view image reconstruction. By leveraging conditional and noisy views, it predicts pixel-aligned Gaussians, achieving state-of-the-art performance. The model also shows potential in generative tasks like text-to-3D and image-to-3D, outperforming existing frameworks.

title: Boosting 3D Object Generation through PBR Materials
figure: First method to enhance 3D object generation quality using PBR materials via diffusion models
abstract: This paper presents a novel approach to improve the quality of 3D object generation by incorporating Physics-Based Rendering (PBR) materials. It leverages Stable Diffusion for extracting albedo and bump maps, while allowing interactive adjustments for roughness and metalness maps. The proposed method enhances realism and geometry alignment in generated 3D objects, demonstrating significant improve

title: Any-to-3D Generation via Hybrid Diffusion Supervision
figure: First method to generate 3D objects from any modality prompts via hybrid diffusion supervision
abstract: XBind is a unified framework for generating 3D objects from various modalities, including text, images, and audio, using cross-modal pre-alignment techniques. It introduces a novel Modality Similarity Loss to enhance alignment between modality prompts and rendered images, improving the quality of generated 3D objects. Extensive experiments demonstrate its capabilities in any-to-3D scenarios.

title: Baking Gaussian Splatting into Diffusion Denoiser for Fast and Scalable Single-stage Image-to-3D Generation and Reconstruction
figure: First single-stage 3D diffusion model for object generation and scene reconstruction from a single view.
abstract: The paper introduces DiffusionGS, a novel single-stage 3D diffusion model that generates 3D Gaussian point clouds from a single view, ensuring view consistency and robustness. It improves upon existing methods by using a scene-object mixed training strategy, achieving significant performance gains in PSNR and FID metrics while being faster than state-of-the-art approaches. The project page and cod

title: SSEditor: Controllable Mask-to-Scene Generation with Diffusion Model
figure: First controllable mask-to-scene generation via a two-stage diffusion model
abstract: SSEditor is a controllable Semantic Scene Editor that generates specified target categories without multiple resampling steps. It utilizes a two-stage diffusion framework, combining a 3D scene autoencoder for latent triplane features and a mask-conditional diffusion model for customizable 3D semantic scene generation. Experiments show improved controllability and quality in generating novel urban

title: MVLight: Relightable Text-to-3D Generation via Light-conditioned Multi-View Diffusion
figure: First light-conditioned text-to-3D generation via multi-view diffusion.
abstract: MVLight introduces a novel light-conditioned multi-view diffusion model for text-to-3D generation, enhancing the quality and relighting performance of generated 3D models. By integrating lighting conditions into the generation process, it synthesizes high-quality images that reflect specified lighting environments across multiple views, improving geometric precision and relighting capabilities.

title: LLaMA-Mesh: Unifying 3D Mesh Generation with Language Models
figure: First model to unify 3D mesh generation with language models via text-based representation.
abstract: LLaMA-Mesh integrates large language models with 3D mesh generation, allowing for conversational generation and understanding of meshes. It tokenizes mesh data into text, enabling LLMs to generate 3D meshes from text prompts and achieve high-quality results comparable to models trained from scratch.

title: GaussianAnything: Interactive Point Cloud Flow Matching For 3D Object Generation
figure: First interactive point cloud flow matching framework for 3D object generation via VAE.
abstract: GaussianAnything presents a novel framework for 3D generation that utilizes a Point Cloud-structured Latent space and a VAE. It supports multi-modal conditional generation from point clouds, captions, and single images, while enabling geometry-texture disentanglement for 3D-aware editing. The method shows improved performance over existing 3D generation techniques.

title: Wavelet Latent Diffusion (Wala): Billion-Parameter 3D Generative Model with Compact Wavelet Encodings
figure: First billion-parameter 3D generative model using wavelet latent encodings for efficient shape generation.
abstract: Wavelet Latent Diffusion (WaLa) introduces a novel method for encoding 3D shapes into compact wavelet-based latent encodings, achieving a 2427x compression ratio with minimal detail loss. This allows for efficient training of large-scale generative networks, producing high-quality 3D shapes rapidly. The model demonstrates state-of-the-art performance in generation quality and computational efficie

title: Edify 3D: Scalable High-Quality 3D Asset Generation
figure: First method to generate high-quality 3D assets using a diffusion model for multi-view synthesis.
abstract: Edify 3D presents a novel approach for generating high-quality 3D assets by synthesizing RGB and surface normal images from multiple viewpoints using a diffusion model. This method enables the reconstruction of detailed geometry, clean shape topologies, and high-resolution textures and materials efficiently.

title: Scaling Mesh Generation via Compressive Tokenization
figure: First mesh generation model using Blocked and Patchified Tokenization for high-detail meshes.
abstract: This paper introduces Blocked and Patchified Tokenization (BPT), a novel mesh representation that significantly compresses mesh sequences, enabling the generation of high-detail meshes. The proposed model leverages BPT to enhance mesh generation capabilities, achieving state-of-the-art performance and supporting flexible control for point clouds and images.

title: Text2CAD: Text to 3D CAD Generation via Technical Drawings
figure: First framework that generates 3D CAD models from text via stable diffusion.
abstract: Text2CAD is a framework that automates the generation of industrial CAD models from user specifications in text. It uses stable diffusion models to convert textual descriptions into detailed isometric images, which are then transformed into orthographic views for 3D CAD reconstruction. This method enhances efficiency in CAD generation, ensuring physical and dimensional consistency.

title: AI-Driven Stylization of 3D Environments
figure: First system that stylizes 3D environments using image-to-3D generative models.
abstract: This paper presents a method for stylizing 3D scenes composed of primitive objects into higher fidelity environments using novel 3D representations like NeRFs. The approach integrates image stylization techniques with image-to-3D generative models, allowing for iterative stylization and compositing of 3D objects into scenes.

title: POC-SLT: Partial Object Completion with SDF Latent Transformers
figure: First transformer-based approach for partial object completion using SDF latent representations.
abstract: The paper presents POC-SLT, a method for 3D shape completion from partial observations using a transformer on latent Signed Distance Fields (SDFs). It partitions SDFs into high-resolution patches and employs a variational autoencoder for smooth latent space encoding. The method shows significant improvements in completing shapes from partial data, evaluated on ShapeNet and ABC datasets.

title: DimensionX: Create Any 3D and 4D Scenes from a Single Image with Controllable Video Diffusion
figure: First framework to generate controllable 3D and 4D scenes from a single image via video diffusion.
abstract: DimensionX is a framework that generates photorealistic 3D and 4D scenes from a single image using video diffusion. It addresses limitations in spatial and temporal controllability by decoupling these factors and introducing a trajectory-aware mechanism for 3D generation. The method shows superior results in controllable video and scene generation compared to previous approaches.

title: Hunyuan3D 1.0: A Unified Framework for Text-to-3D and Image-to-3D Generation
figure: First unified framework for text-to-3D and image-to-3D generation via a two-stage approach
abstract: Hunyuan3D 1.0 introduces a two-stage framework for efficient text- and image-conditioned 3D generation, addressing slow generation and poor generalization in existing models. It employs a multi-view diffusion model for rapid multi-view RGB generation, followed by a feed-forward reconstruction model to recover 3D structures from these images, achieving a balance between speed and quality.

title: DreamPolish: Domain Score Distillation With Progressive Geometry Generation
figure: First text-to-3D model that polishes geometry using domain score distillation.
abstract: DreamPolish is a text-to-3D generation model that enhances geometry and texture quality through a multi-representation approach and a novel surface polishing stage. It addresses artifacts in geometric surfaces by incorporating a normal estimator and employs domain score distillation to improve texture generation. The model demonstrates superior performance in producing 3D assets with refined surfa

title: Wasserstein Flow Matching: Generative modeling over families of distributions
figure: First algorithm to generate distributions in high dimensions via Wasserstein flow matching.
abstract: Wasserstein flow matching (WFM) introduces a novel approach to generative modeling by considering families of distributions, enabling the generation of both 2D and 3D shapes as well as high-dimensional cellular microenvironments. The method utilizes optimal transport theory and attention mechanisms, demonstrating its versatility across different computational scenarios. Code is available at the pr

title: CompGS: Unleashing 2D Compositionality for Compositional Text-to-3D via Dynamically Optimizing 3D Gaussians
figure: First compositional text-to-3D generation framework using 3D Gaussian Splatting via Score Distillation Sampling.
abstract: CompGS introduces a novel framework for compositional text-to-3D generation using 3D Gaussian Splatting. It optimizes 3D Gaussians dynamically to ensure consistent interactions among multiple entities, enhancing detail in smaller objects. The method shows superior performance in generating compositional 3D objects and can be extended for controllable 3D editing.

title: DiffGS: Functional Gaussian Splatting Diffusion
figure: First Gaussian generator for 3D Gaussian Splatting via latent diffusion models
abstract: DiffGS introduces a novel Gaussian generator based on latent diffusion models, addressing the challenges of generating Gaussian Splatting. It enables high-fidelity rendering by representing Gaussian Splatting in a disentangled manner and supports both unconditional and conditional generation from various inputs.

title: 3D-Adapter: Geometry-Consistent Multi-View Diffusion for High-Quality 3D Generation
figure: First method to enhance 3D geometry quality in multi-view diffusion models via 3D feedback augmentation
abstract: 3D-Adapter introduces a module that integrates 3D geometry awareness into existing image diffusion models, improving geometric consistency in 3D object generation. It enhances models like Instant3D and Zero123++ and supports high-quality generation from text and images. The approach includes two variants: a fast feed-forward version and a training-free version using neural fields and meshes.

title: GenUDC: High Quality 3D Mesh Generation with Unsigned Dual Contouring Representation
figure: First high-quality 3D mesh generation using Unsigned Dual Contouring via a coarse-to-fine process
abstract: GenUDC introduces a novel framework for generating high-quality 3D meshes by utilizing Unsigned Dual Contouring (UDC) as the mesh representation. It addresses challenges in existing methods by employing a two-stage generative process that first creates a rough shape and then refines it into a detailed mesh. The approach effectively resolves ambiguity issues and demonstrates superior performance in

title: MvDrag3D: Drag-based Creative 3D Editing via Multi-view Generation-Reconstruction Priors
figure: First drag-based 3D editing framework leveraging multi-view generation via diffusion.
abstract: MVDrag3D introduces a novel framework for flexible drag-based 3D editing using multi-view generation and reconstruction priors. It employs a multi-view diffusion model for consistent editing across views, followed by a reconstruction model for 3D Gaussians. The approach enhances view consistency and visual quality, enabling versatile editing effects across various object categories.

title: Layout-your-3D: Controllable and Precise 3D Generation with 2D Blueprint
figure: First framework for controllable 3D generation from 2D layouts via text prompts
abstract: Layout-Your-3D is a framework that enables controllable and compositional 3D generation using 2D layouts as blueprints. It addresses challenges in existing text-to-3D methods by creating a coarse 3D scene from a 2D layout and optimizing for coherent global layouts. The approach yields visually appealing 3D assets and can be applied to tasks like 3D editing and object insertion.

title: L3DG: Latent 3D Gaussian Diffusion
figure: First approach for generative 3D modeling of 3D Gaussians via latent diffusion.
abstract: L3DG introduces a novel method for generative 3D modeling using latent 3D Gaussian diffusion, enabling the generation of entire room-scale scenes efficiently. By employing a vector-quantized variational autoencoder, the method reduces complexity and enhances detail in object-level generation, allowing for real-time rendering from various viewpoints.

title: DreamCraft3D++: Efficient Hierarchical 3D Generation with Multi-Plane Reconstruction Model
figure: First efficient hierarchical 3D generation with multi-plane reconstruction via feed-forward model
abstract: DreamCraft3D++ enhances the original DreamCraft3D by introducing a feed-forward multi-plane reconstruction model, significantly speeding up the generation of complex 3D assets. It also includes a training-free IP-Adapter for texture refinement, improving both texture and geometry consistency. The method shows superior performance in generating high-quality 3D assets compared to existing image-to-3

title: TV-3DG: Mastering Text-to-3D Customized Generation with Visual Prompt
figure: First text-to-3D generator that integrates visual prompts via Classifier Score Matching.
abstract: TV-3DG enhances text-to-3D generation by addressing limitations of Score Distillation Sampling (SDS) in multi-condition inputs. It introduces a new algorithm, Classifier Score Matching (CSM), and integrates visual prompts with an attention mechanism for improved quality. Extensive experiments validate its capability for stable, high-quality customized 3D generation.

title: Parameterize Structure with Differentiable Template for 3D Shape Generation
figure: First method to parameterize structure with a differentiable template for 3D shape generation.
abstract: This paper introduces a method that uses a differentiable template to parameterize shared structures in 3D shape generation. By employing fixed-length parameters and three-view details, the method effectively reconstructs and generates diverse shapes with intricate details, demonstrating its effectiveness in learning the latent space.

title: ControLRM: Fast and Controllable 3D Generation via Large Reconstruction Model
figure: First end-to-end feed-forward model for rapid and controllable 3D generation via a large reconstruction model.
abstract: ControLRM is a novel feed-forward model that enhances controllability in 3D generation by integrating a 2D condition generator and a triplane decoder transformer. It employs a joint training framework to align 2D and 3D representations, demonstrating strong generalization in 3D generation quality across multiple datasets.

title: Enhancing Single Image to 3D Generation using Gaussian Splatting and Hybrid Diffusion Priors
figure: First method that enhances single image to 3D generation using Gaussian Splatting and hybrid diffusion priors.
abstract: This paper presents a method for generating 3D objects from a single image by integrating Gaussian Splatting with 2D and 3D diffusion models. The approach addresses the limitations of existing models by ensuring geometric consistency and improving texture fidelity, resulting in detailed 3D structures suitable for various applications like AR/VR and robotic manipulation.

title: SceneCraft: Layout-Guided 3D Scene Generation
figure: First method for generating detailed indoor scenes guided by user specifications via a diffusion model.
abstract: SceneCraft is a novel approach for generating complex 3D indoor scenes based on user-provided textual descriptions and spatial layouts. It utilizes a rendering-based technique to convert 3D layouts into multi-view 2D proxy maps and employs a semantic and depth conditioned diffusion model to create multi-view images, ultimately learning a neural radiance field for scene representation. The method e

title: Semantic Score Distillation Sampling for Compositional Text-to-3D Generation
figure: First method for compositional text-to-3D generation using Semantic Score Distillation Sampling.
abstract: This paper presents Semantic Score Distillation Sampling (SemanticSDS), a novel approach for generating high-quality 3D assets from textual descriptions. It addresses challenges in crafting complex 3D scenes by integrating semantic embeddings for improved expressiveness and accuracy. The method enhances existing diffusion models, enabling precise optimization and superior quality in 3D content gen

title: One-shot Generative Domain Adaptation in 3D GANs
figure: First one-shot 3D generative domain adaptation method via GAN.
abstract: This paper introduces 3D-Adapter, a novel method for one-shot 3D generative domain adaptation, enabling the transfer of a pre-trained 3D generator to a new domain using a single reference image. It emphasizes high fidelity, diversity, and consistency across domains and views, employing advanced loss functions and a progressive fine-tuning strategy. The method also supports zero-shot scenarios and

title: SeMv-3D: Towards Concurrency of Semantic and Multi-view Consistency in General Text-to-3D Generation
figure: First framework that jointly enhances semantic alignment and multi-view consistency in Text-to-3D generation via Triplane Prior Learning.
abstract: SeMv-3D addresses challenges in General Text-to-3D generation by enhancing semantic and multi-view consistency. It introduces Triplane Prior Learning to capture spatial correspondences and Prior-based Semantic Aligning for consistent any-view synthesis. The method achieves state-of-the-art results in multi-view consistency while maintaining competitive semantic fidelity.

title: DreamMesh4D: Video-to-4D Generation with Sparse-Controlled Gaussian-Mesh Hybrid Representation
figure: First framework that generates high-quality 4D objects from monocular videos via a hybrid mesh representation.
abstract: DreamMesh4D introduces a novel framework for generating dynamic 3D objects from monocular videos, combining mesh representation with Gaussian splatting for improved spatial-temporal consistency and surface appearance. The method utilizes a deformation network and a geometric skinning algorithm to optimize both texture and mesh vertices, demonstrating compatibility with modern graphic pipelines.

title: Toward General Object-level Mapping from Sparse Views with 3D Diffusion Priors
figure: First general object-level mapping system that uses a 3D diffusion model for multi-category support.
