abstract: The paper presents GOM, a system for object-level mapping that utilizes a 3D diffusion model to generate detailed shapes and poses from sparse multi-view observations. It supports multiple object categories and outputs Neural Radiance Fields for texture and geometry. The method improves mapping accuracy compared to existing techniques and includes a novel probabilistic optimization for integrating

title: Flex3D: Feed-Forward 3D Generation with Flexible Reconstruction Model and Input View Curation
figure: First flexible 3D generation model that utilizes arbitrary high-quality input views via a two-stage framework
abstract: Flex3D introduces a two-stage framework for generating high-quality 3D content from text, single images, or sparse views. It employs a multi-view image diffusion model to create candidate views, which are then curated for quality before being processed by a Flexible Reconstruction Model to output 3D Gaussian points. This approach enhances the diversity and quality of generated 3D shapes, achieving

title: EdgeRunner: Auto-regressive Auto-encoder for Artistic Mesh Generation
figure: First auto-regressive model for high-quality 3D mesh generation via novel tokenization and latent diffusion.
abstract: EdgeRunner introduces an Auto-regressive Auto-encoder model that generates high-quality 3D meshes with improved detail and generalization. It employs a novel mesh tokenization algorithm to convert triangular meshes into 1D token sequences, enhancing training efficiency. The model supports both point cloud and image-conditioned mesh generation, demonstrating superior quality and diversity.

title: Generative Object Insertion in Gaussian Splatting with a Multi-View Diffusion Model
figure: First method for object insertion in 3D content using a multi-view diffusion model.
abstract: This paper presents MVInpainter, a novel method for generating and inserting new objects into 3D scenes using Gaussian Splatting and a multi-view diffusion model. It enhances view-consistent object inpainting and includes a mask-aware 3D reconstruction technique, yielding diverse and high-quality results that outperform existing methods.

title: Occupancy-Based Dual Contouring
figure: First dual contouring method for occupancy functions achieving state-of-the-art performance.
abstract: This paper presents a dual contouring method that enhances the conversion of occupancy functions to meshes, addressing issues like staircase artifacts from Marching Cubes. The method is designed for GPU parallelization and introduces auxiliary points for improved surface normal computation, demonstrating superior fidelity in 3D mesh generation compared to existing methods.

title: 3DTopia-XL: Scaling High-quality 3D Asset Generation via Primitive Diffusion
figure: First scalable 3D generative model using primitive-based representation via diffusion.
abstract: 3DTopia-XL is a scalable generative model for high-quality 3D asset creation, addressing challenges in optimization speed and geometric fidelity. It utilizes a novel primitive-based representation and a Diffusion Transformer framework to generate detailed 3D assets from text or visual inputs, outperforming existing methods in quality and efficiency.

title: Controllable Shape Modeling with Neural Generalized Cylinder
figure: First explicit manipulation of neural signed distance fields via neural generalized cylinder.
abstract: This paper introduces the neural generalized cylinder (NGC) for explicit manipulation of neural signed distance fields (NSDF), allowing for intuitive shape editing. By defining a central curve and assigning neural features along it, NGC facilitates complex deformations and shape blending, demonstrating effectiveness in various non-rigid deformation tasks.

title: Vista3D: Unravel the 3D Darkside of a Single Image
figure: First framework that generates 3D objects from a single image using Gaussian Splatting and SDF optimization.
abstract: Vista3D is a framework designed for rapid 3D generation from single images, utilizing a two-phase approach that combines Gaussian Splatting and Signed Distance Function extraction. It balances consistency and diversity in generated 3D objects, with demos and code available online.

title: LT3SD: Latent Trees for 3D Scene Diffusion
figure: First latent diffusion model for large-scale 3D scene generation using a latent tree representation.
abstract: LT3SD introduces a latent diffusion model designed for generating large-scale 3D scenes. It utilizes a latent tree representation to capture both low and high-frequency details in a hierarchical manner. The model is trained on scene patches, allowing for the synthesis of diverse and complex 3D scenes of varying sizes. Extensive experiments validate its effectiveness for high-quality unconditional

title: DreamMesh: Jointly Manipulating and Texturing Triangle Meshes for Text-to-3D Generation
figure: First text-to-3D generation method that manipulates and textures triangle meshes via a coarse-to-fine scheme
abstract: DreamMesh is a novel architecture for text-to-3D generation that focuses on generating high-fidelity explicit 3D models using triangle meshes. It employs a coarse-to-fine approach to deform and texture the mesh, significantly improving the quality and detail of the generated 3D content compared to existing methods. The project page is available at https://dreammesh.github.io.

title: Hi3D: Pursuing High-Resolution Image-to-3D Generation with Video Diffusion Models
figure: First high-resolution image-to-3D generation model using video diffusion.
abstract: Hi3D introduces a novel video diffusion approach for high-resolution image-to-3D generation, enhancing multi-view consistency and texture detail. By leveraging 3D-aware priors and a video-to-video refiner, it produces superior multi-view images and high-fidelity meshes. The method shows significant improvements in both novel view synthesis and single view reconstruction.

title: MVGaussian: High-Fidelity text-to-3D Content Generation with Multi-View Guidance and Surface Densification
figure: First text-to-3D generation method that uses multi-view guidance and surface densification via Gaussian representation.
abstract: This paper presents MVGaussian, a novel framework for text-to-3D content generation that addresses multi-face ambiguities and optimizes Gaussian representations. By employing multi-view guidance and a new densification algorithm, it enhances the detail and accuracy of generated 3D models. The method demonstrates high-quality outputs with significantly reduced training time compared to existing tec

title: A Latent Implicit 3D Shape Model for Multiple Levels of Detail
figure: First model enabling multiple levels of detail in implicit shape representation via latent conditioning
abstract: This paper presents a novel approach to implicit neural representations that allows for multiple levels of detail while ensuring smooth surfaces. By introducing a latent conditioning method within a multiscale neural architecture, the model efficiently generates signed distance function values, balancing speed and accuracy. The results show that it can achieve high-quality reconstructions comparab

title: DECOLLAGE: 3D Detailization by Controllable, Localized, and Learned Geometry Enhancement
figure: First method for controllable 3D detailization via Pyramid GAN.
abstract: DECOLLAGE introduces a method for refining 3D shapes by allowing users to paint desired styles onto coarse voxel shapes. It utilizes a masking-aware Pyramid GAN to enhance geometries while preserving coarse structures and fine details. The approach enables interactive workflows for creating high-resolution stylized geometries with coherent details and transitions.

title: Prim2Room: Layout-Controllable Room Mesh Generation from Primitives
figure: First framework for controllable room mesh generation from 2D layouts via 3D primitives
abstract: Prim2Room is a framework for generating room meshes that allows for detailed customization based on 2D layout conditions and 3D primitive retrieval. It introduces adaptive viewpoint selection for improved texture and geometry generation, and employs non-rigid depth registration for better alignment and diversity in generated objects, enhancing both accuracy and aesthetic appeal.

title: GenCAD: Image-Conditioned Computer-Aided Design Generation with Transformer-Based Contrastive Representation and Diffusion Priors
figure: First CAD generation model that transforms images into parametric command sequences via autoregressive transformers and diffusion.
abstract: GenCAD introduces a generative model that converts image inputs into editable 3D CAD shapes using autoregressive transformers and latent diffusion. It significantly improves the generation of CAD models, addressing the challenges of modifiability and manufacturability in engineering applications. The model also supports retrieval of CAD models from large databases using image queries.

title: DreamMapping: High-Fidelity Text-to-3D Generation via Variational Distribution Mapping
figure: First high-fidelity text-to-3D generation via Variational Distribution Mapping and Gaussian Splatting
abstract: This paper refines Score Distillation Sampling for text-to-3D generation by introducing Variational Distribution Mapping, which models the distribution of rendered images. The method improves training efficiency and distilling precision, enabling the generation of high-fidelity 3D assets using Gaussian Splatting.

title: Geometry Image Diffusion: Fast and Data-Efficient Text-to-3D with Image-Based Surface Representation
figure: First Text-to-3D model using geometry images for efficient shape representation via diffusion.
abstract: GIMDiffusion is a novel Text-to-3D model that generates high-quality 3D objects from text by utilizing geometry images, allowing for efficient representation and strong generalization with limited 3D data. It integrates a Collaborative Control mechanism to leverage 2D priors from existing Text-to-Image models, enabling fast generation of semantically meaningful 3D assets.

title: COMOGen: A Controllable Text-to-3D Multi-object Generation Framework
figure: First controllable text-to-3D framework for multi-object generation via score distillation
abstract: COMOGen introduces a framework for controllable text-to-3D generation of multiple objects, addressing challenges in positioning with input text. It integrates layout control, multi-view consistency, and content enhancement modules, enhancing diversity and quality in generated 3D content. Experiments show its effectiveness over existing methods.

title: Gen-Swarms: Adapting Deep Generative Models to Swarms of Drones
figure: First method to generate 3D shapes for drone shows via flow matching models.
abstract: Gen-Swarms is a novel approach that combines deep generative models with reactive navigation to automate drone show creation. It adapts flow matching models for 3D point cloud generation, producing accurate shapes and guiding swarm motion to ensure smooth trajectories and collision avoidance. The method can generate various 3D shapes based on text categories, enhancing drone show performance.

title: MeshUp: Multi-Target Mesh Deformation via Blended Score Distillation
figure: First method to deform 3D meshes towards multiple target concepts via blended score distillation.
abstract: MeshUp introduces a technique for deforming 3D meshes towards multiple target concepts defined by text or images. It utilizes a novel score distillation approach to control the influence of these concepts on specific mesh regions. The method employs a probabilistic Region of Interest map to manage the expression of activations, demonstrating effective deformation across various meshes.

title: OctFusion: Octree-based Diffusion Models for 3D Shape Generation
figure: First octree-based diffusion model for high-quality 3D shape generation.
abstract: OctFusion introduces an octree-based latent representation and a unified multi-scale U-Net diffusion model for efficient 3D shape generation. It achieves high-quality results in 2.5 seconds on a single GPU and supports various conditioning methods, including text prompts and sketches. The method demonstrates state-of-the-art performance on ShapeNet and Objaverse datasets.

title: SceneDreamer360: Text-Driven 3D-Consistent Scene Generation with Panoramic Gaussian Splatting
figure: First text-driven 3D-consistent scene generation model using panoramic Gaussian splatting.
abstract: SceneDreamer360 addresses the challenge of spatial inconsistency in text-driven 3D scene generation by leveraging a panoramic image generation model and 3D Gaussian Splatting. This method enhances the quality and consistency of generated 3D scenes from text prompts, producing high-resolution and detail-rich outputs. The approach includes a novel point cloud fusion initialization for improved resul

title: Atlas Gaussians Diffusion for 3D Generation
figure: First 3D generation method using Atlas Gaussians representation via latent diffusion model
abstract: This paper presents Atlas Gaussians, a novel representation for efficient 3D generation using a latent diffusion model. By representing shapes as unions of local patches that decode 3D Gaussians, the method achieves high-quality detail generation. A variational autoencoder is trained to learn this representation, and experiments demonstrate its superiority over previous methods in feed-forward nat

title: Large Point-to-Gaussian Model for Image-to-3D Generation
figure: First Point-to-Gaussian model that generates 3D Gaussian parameters from image input via point cloud.
abstract: This paper introduces a large Point-to-Gaussian model for image-to-3D generation, which utilizes an initial point cloud from a 3D diffusion model to generate Gaussian parameters. The approach incorporates an Attention, Projection, and Point feature extractor mechanism to enhance the fusion of image and point cloud features, achieving state-of-the-art results on GSO and Objaverse datasets.

title: MeshFormer: High-Quality Mesh Generation with 3D-Guided Reconstruction Model
figure: First high-quality mesh generation model leveraging 3D-guided reconstruction via transformers and SDF supervision
abstract: MeshFormer is a sparse-view reconstruction model that utilizes 3D native structure and input guidance to generate high-quality meshes. It combines transformers with 3D convolutions and incorporates normal maps predicted by 2D diffusion models. The model learns to generate textured meshes efficiently, enabling single-image-to-3D and text-to-3D tasks. The project page is available at https://meshfor

title: Efficient and Scalable Point Cloud Generation with Sparse Point-Voxel Diffusion Models
figure: First point cloud U-Net diffusion model that achieves state-of-the-art results in unconditional shape generation.
abstract: This paper introduces a novel point cloud U-Net diffusion architecture that generates high-quality and diverse 3D shapes efficiently. It combines point and sparse voxel representations, outperforming non-diffusion methods and achieving state-of-the-art results among diffusion models. The model supports both unconditional and conditional generation, demonstrating scalability and performance in poin

title: Deep Geometric Moments Promote Shape Consistency in Text-to-3D Generation
figure: First text-to-3D model that ensures geometric consistency using deep geometric moments via SDS.
abstract: MT3D is a text-to-3D generative model that addresses viewpoint bias in diffusion models by using depth maps from high-quality 3D models as control signals. It incorporates deep geometric moments to enhance geometric consistency in generated 3D objects, improving their quality and usability.

title: Scene123: One Prompt to 3D Scene Generation via Video-Assisted and Consistency-Enhanced MAE
figure: First 3D scene generation model that ensures realism and consistency via video-assisted MAE.
abstract: Scene123 is a 3D scene generation model that leverages video generation frameworks and implicit neural representations to create realistic large-scale scenes from single inputs. It addresses view consistency challenges by optimizing a neural radiance field and enhancing detail fidelity using a GAN-based loss. Experimental results show it outperforms existing methods.

title: FlowDreamer: Exploring High Fidelity Text-to-3D Generation via Rectified Flow
figure: First high fidelity text-to-3D generation via rectified flow model.
abstract: FlowDreamer introduces a novel framework for text-to-3D generation that addresses issues of over-smoothing textures and color saturation in existing methods. By integrating Score Distillation Sampling with a rectified flow model, it optimizes 3D model updates and achieves high fidelity results with improved textual detail and faster convergence.

title: An Object is Worth 64x64 Pixels: Generating 3D Object via Image Diffusion
figure: First method to generate 3D objects via image diffusion using Object Images representation.
abstract: This paper presents a novel method for generating realistic 3D models using a representation called 'Object Images,' which condenses complex 3D shapes into 64x64 pixel images. By leveraging image generation models like Diffusion Transformers, the approach effectively addresses geometric and semantic irregularities in polygonal meshes, achieving competitive results on the ABO dataset.

title: DreamLCM: Towards High-Quality Text-to-3D Generation via Latent Consistency Model
figure: First high-quality text-to-3D generation via Latent Consistency Model.
abstract: DreamLCM addresses the poor quality of 3D object generation in text-to-3D tasks by incorporating a Latent Consistency Model. It enhances guidance for generating detailed 3D models through improved calibration and dual timestep strategies, achieving state-of-the-art results in generation quality and training efficiency.

title: MeshAnything V2: Artist-Created Mesh Generation With Adjacent Mesh Tokenization
figure: First mesh generation model that uses Adjacent Mesh Tokenization for improved efficiency
abstract: MeshAnything V2 is an advanced autoregressive model for generating meshes, introducing a novel Adjacent Mesh Tokenization method that optimizes vertex representation. This innovation reduces token sequence length and enhances mesh generation efficiency, allowing for the creation of complex meshes with improved performance. The authors plan to release their code and models publicly.

title: iControl3D: An Interactive System for Controllable 3D Scene Generation
figure: First interactive system for controllable 3D scene generation via 2D diffusion images
abstract: iControl3D is an interactive system that allows users to generate customizable 3D scenes with precise control. It utilizes 3D meshes as intermediaries to merge 2D diffusion-generated images into a unified 3D representation, incorporating boundary-aware depth alignment and environment maps for remote content. The system includes a neural rendering interface for scene navigation. Code will be availa

title: A General Framework to Boost 3D GS Initialization for Text-to-3D Generation by Lexical Richness
figure: First framework to enhance 3D GS initialization for text-to-3D generation using lexical richness.
abstract: This paper presents a novel framework to improve 3D Gaussian Splatting (GS) initialization for text-to-3D generation, addressing issues with shape similarity and complexity in text prompts. By aggregating 3D Gaussians into voxelized representations and introducing new network components, the method enhances spatial and semantic interactions, leading to higher quality 3D shape generation from diver

title: Localized Gaussian Splatting Editing with Contextual Awareness
figure: First illumination-aware 3D scene editing pipeline for Gaussian Splatting via diffusion.
abstract: This paper presents an illumination-aware 3D scene editing pipeline using 3D Gaussian Splatting. It leverages a conditional 2D diffusion model for inpainting to ensure consistent lighting in edited scenes. The method includes a coarse-to-fine optimization process and introduces a Depth-guided Inpainting Score Distillation Sampling for enhanced geometry and texture details, demonstrating robustness

title: Dynamic Scene Understanding through Object-Centric Voxelization and Neural Rendering
figure: First object-centric 3D generative model for dynamic scenes via voxelization and neural rendering.
abstract: DynaVol-S is a 3D generative model that enables object-centric learning from unsupervised videos by performing object-centric voxelization. It captures 3D scene dynamics and integrates 2D semantic features to create 3D semantic grids. The model outperforms existing methods in novel view synthesis and unsupervised decomposition, allowing for novel scene generation and manipulation of object motion

title: From Flat to Spatial: Comparison of 4 methods constructing 3D, 2 and 1/2D Models from 2D Plans with neural networks
figure: First comparative study of four methods for generating 3D architectural models from 2D images.
abstract: This paper evaluates four methods for converting 2D images into 3D meshes, focusing on their application in architecture. The methods include diffusion-based and GAN approaches, emphasizing rapid prototyping and detailed visualization. The study highlights improvements in design cycle times and accuracy, showcasing advancements in 3D mesh generation for architectural practices.

title: Cycle3D: High-quality and Consistent Image-to-3D Generation via Generation-Reconstruction Cycle
figure: First unified 3D generation framework that cyclically combines 2D diffusion and 3D reconstruction.
abstract: Cycle3D introduces a novel framework for generating high-quality 3D content by integrating a 2D diffusion model with a feed-forward 3D reconstruction model. This approach enhances texture quality and consistency across multiple views, addressing common issues in traditional multi-view diffusion models. The method shows significant improvements in generating diverse and consistent 3D shapes compare

title: FINER++: Building a Family of Variable-periodic Functions for Activating Implicit Neural Representation
figure: First framework to improve implicit neural representation using variable-periodic functions.
abstract: FINER++ enhances implicit neural representation by addressing spectral bias and capacity-convergence gaps through variable-periodic activation functions. This approach allows for better representation of complex signals, including 3D signed distance fields, and demonstrates improved performance across various tasks. The framework is validated with different activation function backbones and showca

title: ScalingGaussian: Enhancing 3D Content Creation with Generative Gaussian Splatting
figure: First framework that combines 3D and 2D diffusion models for high-quality 3D asset generation.
abstract: ScalingGaussian is a novel framework for creating high-quality 3D assets by integrating 3D and 2D diffusion models. It generates point clouds, refines them with Gaussian noise, and converts them into meshes while optimizing textures. This method addresses the challenges of sparse point clouds and enhances geometric consistency and texture detail, making 3D content creation more accessible.

title: DreamDissector: Learning Disentangled Text-to-3D Generation from 2D Diffusion Priors
figure: First text-to-3D method that generates multiple independent objects with interactions via NeRF and CSDS.
abstract: DreamDissector enhances text-to-3D generation by producing multiple independent objects with spatial interactions, addressing limitations of existing methods. It utilizes a multi-object text-to-3D NeRF input and introduces the Neural Category Field and Category Score Distillation Sampling for effective object synthesis. The approach allows for refined geometry and texture, enabling creative applic

title: RGB2Point: 3D Point Cloud Generation from Single RGB Images
figure: First method to generate 3D point clouds from single RGB images using Transformer.
abstract: RGB2Point is a novel approach for generating dense 3D point clouds from unposed single-view RGB images using pre-trained Transformer layers. It outperforms previous methods in terms of quality and efficiency, achieving significant improvements in Chamfer and Earth Mover's distances on both real and synthetic datasets.

title: HOTS3D: Hyper-Spherical Optimal Transport for Semantic Alignment of Text-to-3D Generation
figure: First method to align text features to image features for text-to-3D generation via spherical optimal transport.
abstract: HOTS3D addresses the challenge of generating accurate 3D shapes from text by aligning text and image features using spherical optimal transport. It formulates a solution for high-dimensional feature alignment and employs a diffusion-based generator to produce 3D shapes, showing improved consistency with text semantics compared to existing methods.

title: PlacidDreamer: Advancing Harmony in Text-to-3D Generation
figure: First text-to-3D framework that harmonizes multi-view generation and text conditioning via a single diffusion model
abstract: PlacidDreamer is a text-to-3D generation framework that addresses limitations in previous methods by harmonizing initialization, multi-view generation, and text conditioning using a single multi-view diffusion model. It introduces a novel score distillation algorithm to balance saturation and improve detail richness. Extensive experiments demonstrate its capabilities.

title: PASTA: Controllable Part-Aware Shape Generation with Autoregressive Transformers
figure: First controllable part-aware shape generation using autoregressive transformers
abstract: PASTA introduces an autoregressive transformer architecture for generating high-quality 3D shapes, utilizing cuboidal primitives and a blending network. It allows for diverse shape generation from various inputs, including text and images, while considering the part-based structure of objects for meaningful variations. Evaluations demonstrate its superiority in realism and diversity over existing

title: Connecting Consistency Distillation to Score Distillation for Text-to-3D Generation
figure: First text-to-3D generation method that connects consistency distillation to score distillation via Guided Consistency Sampling.
abstract: This paper addresses issues in text-to-3D generation, such as limited detail and low fidelity, by analyzing score distillation methods and proposing an optimization framework called Guided Consistency Sampling (GCS). The authors also introduce a Brightness-Equalized Generation scheme to improve rendering quality. Experimental results show enhanced detail and fidelity in generated 3D assets compare

title: 4Dynamic: Text-to-4D Generation with Hybrid Priors
figure: First method for text-to-4D generation with hybrid priors via video supervision
abstract: This paper presents a novel approach for text-to-4D generation that leverages a text-to-video diffusion model to enhance realism and dynamic motion. The method involves static 3D generation guided by text and video frames, followed by dynamic generation with customized loss functions for consistency. It also introduces a dynamic modeling representation to ensure continuity and topological changes,

title: JointDreamer: Ensuring Geometry Consistency and Text Congruence in Text-to-3D Generation via Joint Score Distillation
figure: First method ensuring geometry consistency and text congruence in text-to-3D generation via Joint Score Distillation.
abstract: JointDreamer introduces a new paradigm for text-to-3D generation that addresses 3D inconsistency by modeling joint image distributions. It employs Joint Score Distillation to ensure coherence across multiple views, enhancing generative details and achieving high metrics for text congruence and geometric fidelity.

title: UrbanWorld: An Urban World Model for 3D City Generation
figure: First generative urban world model that creates customizable 3D urban environments via diffusion.
abstract: UrbanWorld is a generative model designed to automatically create realistic and interactive 3D urban environments. It utilizes a four-stage generation pipeline, including flexible layout generation, urban scene design, controllable asset rendering, and scene refinement. The model demonstrates state-of-the-art realism and controllability using both text and image prompts, and is available as an ope

title: VividDreamer: Invariant Score Distillation For Hyper-Realistic Text-to-3D Generation
figure: First method to enhance text-to-3D generation via Invariant Score Distillation.
abstract: VividDreamer introduces Invariant Score Distillation (ISD) to improve text-to-3D generation by addressing issues in Score Distillation Sampling (SDS). By decoupling SDS into two components and utilizing an invariant score term, ISD mitigates over-saturation and over-smoothing, resulting in high-fidelity 3D object generation through single-stage optimization.

title: Tailor3D: Customized 3D Assets Editing and Generation with Dual-Side Images
figure: First method for customized 3D asset generation and editing using dual-side images via multi-view diffusion.
abstract: Tailor3D introduces a novel pipeline for creating and editing customized 3D assets from dual-side images, addressing challenges in detailed customization. It employs a Dual-sided LRM to integrate front and back views, enhancing editing capabilities and efficiency. The method demonstrates effectiveness in various 3D generation and editing tasks, providing a user-friendly solution for asset customiz

title: Meta 3D Gen
figure: First fast pipeline for text-to-3D asset generation with high fidelity via a combined approach
abstract: Meta 3D Gen (3DGen) is a state-of-the-art pipeline for generating 3D assets from text prompts, achieving high fidelity and quality in under a minute. It supports physically-based rendering and generative retexturing, integrating multiple representation techniques to enhance performance compared to existing models.

title: Meta 3D AssetGen: Text-to-Mesh Generation with High-Quality Geometry, Texture, and PBR Materials
figure: First text-to-3D generation that outputs high-quality meshes with PBR materials via deferred shading loss.
abstract: Meta 3D AssetGen is a novel text-to-3D generation method that produces high-quality meshes with realistic textures and materials. It utilizes a sign-distance function for reliable shape representation and a deferred shading loss for efficient supervision. The method shows significant improvements in reconstruction metrics and human preference over existing competitors. A project page with generate

title: ScaleDreamer: Scalable Text-to-3D Synthesis with Asynchronous Score Distillation
figure: First scalable text-to-3D synthesis method using Asynchronous Score Distillation.
abstract: ScaleDreamer introduces Asynchronous Score Distillation (ASD) to enhance text-to-3D synthesis by minimizing noise prediction errors at earlier diffusion timesteps. This method allows for stable training and scalability to 100k prompts, improving the quality and consistency of generated 3D content without altering the pretrained diffusion model's weights.

title: Director3D: Real-world Camera Trajectory and 3D Scene Generation from Text
figure: First framework to generate real-world 3D scenes and camera trajectories from text via a Trajectory Diffusion Transformer and Gaussian-driven Latent Diffusion Model.
abstract: Director3D is a text-to-3D generation framework that addresses the challenge of complex camera trajectories in real-world datasets. It utilizes a Trajectory Diffusion Transformer to model camera trajectories and a Gaussian-driven Multi-view Latent Diffusion Model to generate pixel-aligned 3D Gaussians, refining them with a novel SDS++ loss. The framework shows superior performance in generating re

title: Masked Generative Extractor for Synergistic Representation and 3D Generation of Point Clouds
figure: First framework that integrates 3D representation learning and generative learning for point clouds via VAE.
abstract: The paper introduces Point-MGE, a framework that combines 3D representation learning with generative learning to enhance point cloud processing. It employs a vector quantized variational autoencoder for reconstructing neural field representations and demonstrates strong performance in generating high-quality 3D shapes in both unconditional and conditional settings.

title: Geometry-Aware Score Distillation via 3D Consistent Noising and Gradient Consistency Modeling
figure: First geometry-aware score distillation method for text-to-3D generation via 3D consistent noising.
abstract: This paper presents GSD, a framework that enhances score distillation sampling for text-to-3D generation by addressing geometric inconsistencies. It incorporates 3D consistent noising and gradient consistency modeling to improve the quality of generated 3D shapes. The method shows significant performance improvements while being computationally efficient and compatible with existing models.

title: GeoLRM: Geometry-Aware Large Reconstruction Model for High-Quality 3D Gaussian Generation
figure: First geometry-aware model that generates high-quality 3D Gaussian representations via a transformer structure
abstract: GeoLRM introduces a Geometry-Aware Large Reconstruction Model that predicts high-quality 3D assets using 512k Gaussians and 21 input images. It addresses the limitations of previous methods by incorporating a 3D-aware transformer and deformable cross-attention mechanisms, enabling better integration of image features into 3D representations. The model shows significant improvements in 3D generatio

title: A3D: Does Diffusion Dream about 3D Alignment?
figure: First method for aligned text-driven 3D object generation via Score Distillation
abstract: The paper addresses text-driven 3D generation by focusing on geometry alignment. It proposes a method that generates a collection of semantically aligned objects by embedding them into a common latent space and optimizing transitions between them. The approach emphasizes smoothness and plausibility of these transitions, demonstrating its effectiveness in applications like 3D editing and object hyb

title: VividDreamer: Towards High-Fidelity and Efficient Text-to-3D Generation
figure: First efficient text-to-3D generation method using Pose-dependent Consistency Distillation Sampling.
abstract: VividDreamer introduces a novel objective for text-to-3D generation that addresses quality issues in existing methods by utilizing Pose-dependent Consistency Distillation Sampling (PCDS). This approach allows for more accurate gradient approximation and efficient generation of 3D assets, significantly improving upon state-of-the-art methods in both quality and training efficiency.

title: Sampling 3D Gaussian Scenes in Seconds with Latent Diffusion Models
figure: First latent diffusion model for 3D scene generation from 2D images
abstract: This paper introduces a latent diffusion model for generating 3D scenes using only 2D image data. It employs an autoencoder to map multi-view images to 3D Gaussian splats and trains a diffusion model in the latent space. The method allows for rapid scene generation, achieving results in as little as 0.2 seconds, and demonstrates high-quality output across complex scenes.

title: MeshAnything: Artist-Created Mesh Generation with Autoregressive Transformers
figure: First model that generates artist-created meshes via autoregressive transformers
abstract: MeshAnything addresses the inefficiencies in current mesh extraction methods by treating mesh extraction as a generation problem. It produces artist-created meshes aligned with specified shapes, enhancing the application of various 3D asset production methods. The model combines a VQ-VAE for mesh vocabulary learning with a shape-conditioned transformer for autoregressive mesh generation, achieving

title: OrientDream: Streamlining Text-to-3D Generation with Explicit Orientation Control
figure: First text-to-3D generation method with explicit orientation control via SDS
abstract: OrientDream enhances text-to-3D generation by introducing a camera orientation conditioned framework, addressing fidelity and efficiency issues in existing methods like Dreamfusion. It leverages a pre-trained 2D text-to-image diffusion model and utilizes multi-view data to optimize implicit representations, resulting in faster and more consistent 3D model generation.

title: GradeADreamer: Enhanced Text-to-3D Generation Using Gaussian Splatting and Multi-View Diffusion
figure: First text-to-3D generation method that mitigates the Multi-face Janus problem via a three-stage training pipeline.
abstract: GradeADreamer introduces a novel three-stage training pipeline for text-to-3D generation, addressing challenges like the Multi-face Janus problem and long generation times. Utilizing a Multi-view Diffusion Model to create Gaussian Splats, it refines geometry and texture with StableDiffusion, achieving high-quality assets efficiently. Experimental results show significant improvements over previous

title: Generative Gaussian Splatting for Unbounded 3D City Generation
figure: First efficient framework for unbounded 3D city generation via Gaussian Splatting
abstract: GaussianCity introduces a generative framework for efficiently synthesizing unbounded 3D cities using Gaussian Splatting. It employs a compact 3D scene representation and a spatial-aware decoder to manage VRAM usage, achieving state-of-the-art results in city generation with significant speed improvements over previous methods.

title: SYM3D: Learning Symmetric Triplanes for Better 3D-Awareness of GANs
figure: First 3D-aware GAN that incorporates reflectional symmetry for improved 3D asset generation from single-view images.
abstract: SYM3D is a novel 3D-aware GAN that utilizes reflectional symmetry and a view-aware spatial attention mechanism to enhance 3D representation learning. It effectively generates detailed 3D assets from single-view images, addressing the limitations of traditional multi-view approaches. The method shows improved performance on both synthetic and real-world datasets, reducing artifacts in text-to-3D ta

title: MVGamba: Unify 3D Content Generation as State Space Sequence Modeling
figure: First lightweight Gaussian reconstruction model for 3D content generation via State Space Modeling.
abstract: MVGamba is a novel Gaussian reconstruction model that integrates multi-view diffusion models to generate high-quality 3D content efficiently. It addresses issues of multi-view inconsistency and blurred textures by utilizing a State Space Model for causal context propagation, enabling effective cross-view self-refinement. The model supports 3D generation from various inputs, including single images

title: VP-LLM: Text-Driven 3D Volume Completion with Large Language Models through Patchification
figure: First text-driven 3D volume completion using large language models via patchification
abstract: VP-LLM introduces a method for conditional 3D volume completion that utilizes large language models to interpret complex text instructions. By dividing incomplete 3D objects into patches, the model captures relationships and semantic meanings, achieving superior generation quality compared to existing diffusion-based methods.

title: Efficient 3D Shape Generation via Diffusion Mamba with Bidirectional SSMs
figure: First efficient 3D shape generation via Diffusion Mamba with linear complexity
abstract: The paper introduces Diffusion Mamba (DiM-3D), a novel architecture for generating 3D point clouds that overcomes scalability issues of traditional diffusion transformers by utilizing a selective state space approach. It achieves state-of-the-art performance in generating high-fidelity 3D shapes and excels in point cloud completion, demonstrating efficiency and scalability for high-resolution voxe

title: DIRECT-3D: Learning Direct Text-to-3D Generation on Massive Noisy 3D Data
figure: First diffusion-based model for text-to-3D generation using noisy 3D data.
abstract: DIRECT-3D is a diffusion-based model that generates high-quality 3D assets from text prompts, trained on extensive noisy 3D data. It features a novel learning framework for data filtering and alignment, and a tri-plane representation that separates geometry and color features. The model achieves state-of-the-art performance in text-to-3D generation and can serve as a geometric prior for 3D lifting

title: GeoGen: Geometry-Aware Generative Modeling via Signed Distance Functions
figure: First SDF-based generative model for 3D geometry synthesis from single-view collections.
abstract: GeoGen is a novel generative model that synthesizes 3D geometry and images from single-view collections by employing Signed Distance Functions (SDF). It addresses the limitations of existing volumetric density approaches, producing higher fidelity meshes through adversarial training and learnable transformations. The model is evaluated on a synthetic dataset of human avatars, demonstrating improve

title: Dream-in-Style: Text-to-3D Generation Using Stylized Score Distillation
figure: First method to generate 3D objects in styles via stylized score distillation.
abstract: This paper introduces a method for generating 3D objects that align with a text prompt and a style reference image. It employs a stylized score distillation loss to optimize the text-to-3D process, producing visually plausible geometry and appearance. The approach combines a pretrained text-to-image model with modified self-attention features to incorporate styles, demonstrating strong visual perf

title: Ouroboros3D: Image-to-3D Generation via 3D-aware Recursive Diffusion
figure: First unified 3D generation framework that integrates diffusion-based multi-view image generation and 3D reconstruction via recursive diffusion.
abstract: Ouroboros3D introduces a unified framework for image-to-3D generation that combines multi-view image generation and 3D reconstruction into a recursive diffusion process. This approach allows for improved geometric consistency and robust inference by jointly training the two modules. Experiments demonstrate its superiority over traditional two-stage methods. Project page: https://costwen.github.io/

title: GSGAN: Adversarial Learning for Hierarchical Generation of 3D Gaussian Splats
figure: First hierarchical generation of 3D Gaussian splats via GAN.
abstract: This paper presents GSGAN, a novel approach that utilizes a hierarchical multi-scale Gaussian representation for 3D GANs, addressing training instability and scale adjustment issues. The method significantly improves rendering speed while maintaining 3D generation quality, outperforming existing models. Experimental results show a 100x speed increase in rendering compared to state-of-the-art metho

title: Tetrahedron Splatting for 3D Generation
figure: First 3D representation that integrates tetrahedron splatting for efficient mesh extraction and rendering via signed distance fields.
abstract: This paper presents Tetrahedron Splatting (TeT-Splatting), a novel 3D representation that enhances optimization convergence, mesh extraction, and rendering efficiency. By utilizing a structured tetrahedral grid and a differentiable rasterizer, it improves generation quality and stability without requiring mesh extraction during training. The method shows superior performance compared to existing t

title: Freeplane: Unlocking Free Lunch in Triplane-Based Sparse-View Reconstruction Models
figure: First method to improve feed-forward 3D generation quality using triplane modulation.
abstract: Freeplane enhances the quality of 3D asset generation from single-view images by addressing high-frequency artifacts in triplanes. It filters and combines triplane features to produce better textured meshes without additional training, improving the robustness of existing feed-forward models against inconsistencies in generated multi-view images.

title: MeshXL: Neural Coordinate Field for Generative 3D Foundation Models
figure: First generative pre-trained auto-regressive model for high-quality 3D mesh generation.
abstract: MeshXL introduces a novel approach to generating high-fidelity 3D meshes by treating the generation process as an auto-regressive problem. Utilizing the Neural Coordinate Field representation, it demonstrates effective sequential mesh modeling and serves as a foundation model for various applications.

title: Hybrid Fourier Score Distillation for Efficient One Image to 3D Object Generation
figure: First hybrid Fourier score distillation method for efficient image-to-3D object generation.
abstract: This paper presents a novel approach for single image-to-3D generation by combining 3D geometric priors from a novel view diffusion model with 2D appearance priors from an image generation model. The proposed method, hy-FSD, optimizes 3D Gaussians for geometric consistency while enhancing visual quality through Fourier transform. The resulting pipeline, Fourier123, enables rapid and high-quality 3

title: Unique3D: High-Quality and Efficient 3D Mesh Generation from a Single Image
figure: First image-to-3D framework that efficiently generates high-quality meshes from single-view images via multi-view diffusion.
abstract: Unique3D is a novel framework for generating high-quality 3D meshes from single-view images, addressing issues of fidelity and efficiency. It combines a multi-view diffusion model with a normal diffusion model and an instant mesh reconstruction algorithm to enhance geometric and textural details, outperforming existing methods.

title: GECO: Generative Image-to-3D within a SECOnd
figure: First high-quality image-to-3D mesh generation method that operates within a second via a two-stage approach.
abstract: GECO is a novel method for efficient and high-quality 3D generative modeling that combines a single-step multi-view generative model with score distillation and a second-stage distillation to address view inconsistency. This approach optimizes both quality and efficiency in image-to-3D mesh generation, achieving impressive results in a short time frame.

title: CLAY: A Controllable Large-scale Generative Model for Creating High-quality 3D Assets
figure: First large-scale generative model for creating high-quality 3D assets via VAE and Diffusion.
abstract: CLAY is a 3D geometry and material generator that transforms human imagination into intricate 3D structures using text, image, and 3D-aware controls. It employs a multi-resolution VAE and a latent Diffusion Transformer to extract rich 3D priors from diverse geometries. The model can generate both 3D shapes and physically-based rendering textures, enabling users to create detailed 3D assets easily.

title: REPARO: Compositional 3D Assets Generation with Differentiable 3D Layout Alignment
figure: First compositional 3D asset generation method that optimizes layout via differentiable rendering.
abstract: REPARO is a novel approach for generating compositional 3D assets from single images, addressing challenges in multi-object scenes. It extracts individual objects and reconstructs their 3D meshes, optimizing their layout through differentiable rendering techniques. This method enhances object independence and scene coherence, demonstrating effectiveness in multi-object 3D scene generation.

title: Atlas3D: Physically Constrained Self-Supporting Text-to-3D for Simulation and Fabrication
figure: First text-to-3D method ensuring self-supporting models via physical constraints
abstract: Atlas3D enhances text-to-3D generation by ensuring the produced models are self-supporting and stable under physical laws. It integrates a differentiable simulation-based loss function with regularization to improve existing Score Distillation Sampling methods. The approach is validated through extensive generation tasks in both simulated and real-world settings.

title: EG4D: Explicit Generation of 4D Object without Score Distillation
figure: First explicit generation of 4D objects without score distillation.
abstract: EG4D introduces a novel framework for generating high-quality 4D objects from a single input image, addressing challenges like temporal inconsistency and semantic defects. The method utilizes collaborative techniques, including attention strategies and Gaussian Splatting, to enhance generation quality. Results show significant improvements over existing methods, with code to be released.

title: PivotMesh: Generic 3D Mesh Generation via Pivot Vertices Guidance
figure: First generic 3D mesh generation framework that extends native mesh generation to large-scale datasets via pivot vertices guidance.
abstract: PivotMesh introduces a scalable framework for generating compact and detailed 3D meshes by employing a transformer-based auto-encoder. It learns to generate pivot vertices for coarse mesh representation and then decodes complete mesh tokens hierarchically. This approach enhances controllability and versatility, allowing effective learning from both small and large datasets.

title: Diffusion4D: Fast Spatial-temporal Consistent 4D Generation via Video Diffusion Models
figure: First efficient 4D content generation method via video diffusion models.
abstract: Diffusion4D introduces a novel framework for fast and scalable 4D content generation, addressing spatial and temporal consistency in 4D geometry. By leveraging a dynamic 3D dataset, it synthesizes orbital views of dynamic 3D assets and employs a new motion magnitude reconstruction loss for improved generation. The method achieves high-fidelity 4D assets quickly, outperforming previous techniques i

title: ExactDreamer: High-Fidelity Text-to-3D Content Creation via Exact Score Matching
figure: First method for high-fidelity text-to-3D generation via Exact Score Matching.
abstract: ExactDreamer addresses the limitations of existing text-to-3D methods by introducing Exact Score Matching (ESM), which ensures exact recovery during the DDIM reverse process. This approach improves the detailed generation of 3D objects, overcoming issues related to over-smoothing and reconstruction errors. Extensive experiments validate its effectiveness in generating high-fidelity 3D content from

title: Score Distillation via Reparametrized DDIM
figure: Improves 3D shape generation quality via modified Score Distillation Sampling.
abstract: This paper addresses the over-smoothing issue in 3D shape generation using Score Distillation Sampling (SDS) by modifying the noise approximation process. The proposed method enhances the quality of 3D outputs, making them closer to 2D generation quality without requiring additional training or supervision. Experimental results demonstrate improved performance compared to existing SDS methods.

title: Challenges and Opportunities in 3D Content Generation
figure: First comprehensive overview of 3D content generation using pre-trained diffusion models.
abstract: This paper investigates the field of 3D content generation, focusing on methods like Text-to-3D and Image-to-3D. It highlights the challenges and opportunities in automatic 3D content generation, emphasizing the need for further research and proposing solutions for leveraging diffusion models in this area.

title: Diff3DS: Generating View-Consistent 3D Sketch via Differentiable Curve Rendering
figure: First framework for generating view-consistent 3D sketches via differentiable rendering.
abstract: Diff3DS introduces a differentiable rendering framework for generating view-consistent 3D sketches from 3D parametric curves. It optimizes these curves under various supervisions, allowing for tasks like text-to-3D and image-to-3D sketch generation. The framework bridges 3D sketches and raster images, enabling end-to-end optimization through gradients computed in the 2D image domain. Promising exp

title: CraftsMan3D: High-fidelity Mesh Generation with 3D Native Generation and Interactive Geometry Refiner
figure: First high-fidelity mesh generation system with interactive geometry refinement via 3D native diffusion.
abstract: CraftsMan3D is a generative 3D modeling system that produces high-fidelity geometries with varied shapes and regular mesh topologies. It utilizes a 3D native diffusion model for quick generation and allows for interactive refinement of geometry. The method improves robustness and generalizability by leveraging multi-view diffusion, achieving superior-quality 3D assets compared to existing techniqu

title: Direct3D: Scalable Image-to-3D Generation via 3D Latent Diffusion Transformer
figure: First scalable image-to-3D generation model via 3D latent diffusion transformer
abstract: Direct3D introduces a scalable 3D generative model that generates high-quality 3D assets from text and images. It features a Direct 3D Variational Auto-Encoder and a Direct 3D Diffusion Transformer, enabling efficient encoding and modeling of 3D shapes. The method achieves superior generation quality and generalization, setting a new state-of-the-art for 3D content creation.

title: LDM: Large Tensorial SDF Model for Textured Mesh Generation
figure: First framework that generates high-fidelity textured meshes from single images or text prompts via a multi-view diffusion model.
abstract: LDM introduces a feed-forward framework for generating high-quality, illumination-decoupled textured meshes from single images or text prompts. It utilizes a multi-view diffusion model to create sparse inputs and a transformer to predict a tensorial SDF field, followed by a mesh optimization layer for refinement. The method demonstrates the ability to produce diverse 3D mesh assets quickly.

title: Dreamer XL: Towards High-Resolution Text-to-3D Generation via Trajectory Score Matching
figure: First high-resolution text-to-3D generation method using Trajectory Score Matching.
abstract: This paper introduces Trajectory Score Matching (TSM) to address pseudo ground truth inconsistency in text-to-3D generation. By generating two paths from a single starting point, TSM reduces accumulated error and enhances model stability. The method optimizes high-resolution generation using Stable Diffusion XL and demonstrates significant improvements in visual quality and performance over existi

title: CAT3D: Create Anything in 3D with Multi-View Diffusion Models
figure: First method to create 3D scenes from any number of input images using multi-view diffusion models.
abstract: CAT3D introduces a novel approach for creating 3D scenes by simulating the image capture process with a multi-view diffusion model. It generates consistent novel views from input images, enabling robust 3D reconstruction in real-time. The method significantly improves upon existing techniques for single and few-view 3D scene creation.

title: Dual3D: Efficient and Consistent Text-to-3D Generation with Dual-mode Multi-view Latent Diffusion
figure: First efficient text-to-3D generation framework using dual-mode multi-view latent diffusion.
abstract: Dual3D is a text-to-3D generation framework that produces high-quality 3D assets in just one minute. It employs a dual-mode multi-view latent diffusion model for efficient denoising and consistent rendering. The method significantly reduces generation time while maintaining quality, with a project page available for further details.

title: Flow Score Distillation for Diverse Text-to-3D Generation
figure: First method to enhance diversity in text-to-3D generation via Flow Score Distillation.
abstract: This paper presents Flow Score Distillation (FSD), a novel text-to-3D generation method that improves diversity in generated 3D assets by addressing limitations in existing Score Distillation Sampling (SDS) techniques. The authors demonstrate that their approach significantly enhances generation diversity while maintaining quality across various text-to-image diffusion models.

title: DiffTF++: 3D-aware Diffusion Transformer for Large-Vocabulary 3D Generation
figure: First diffusion-based framework for large-vocabulary 3D generation via a 3D-aware transformer.
abstract: DiffTF++ introduces a diffusion-based feed-forward framework for generating diverse and high-quality 3D assets. It employs an improved triplane and a 3D-aware transformer to enhance generative performance, particularly in texture synthesis. The model is fine-tuned using multi-view reconstruction loss, leading to state-of-the-art results in 3D object generation across various categories.

title: Coin3D: Controllable and Interactive 3D Assets Generation with Proxy-Guided Conditioning
figure: First controllable and interactive 3D assets generation framework using proxy-guided conditioning.
abstract: Coin3D introduces a novel framework for controllable and interactive 3D asset generation, allowing users to manipulate 3D models using coarse geometry proxies. It features techniques for precise part editing and responsive previews, enhancing the efficiency and flexibility of 3D modeling workflows.

title: SketchDream: Sketch-based Text-to-3D Generation and Editing
figure: First method for sketch-based text-to-3D generation and editing via a multi-view image generation diffusion model
abstract: SketchDream integrates sketch and text for 3D generation, addressing geometry control and editing challenges. It employs a diffusion model for multi-view image generation and a 3D ControlNet for consistency, allowing for local editing of 3D models. The method shows improved quality and control over existing techniques.

title: 3DMeshNet: A Three-Dimensional Differential Neural Network for Structured Mesh Generation
figure: First method for structured mesh generation via neural networks.
abstract: 3DMeshNet introduces a novel approach for generating structured 3D meshes by embedding meshing-related differential equations into the neural network's loss function. This method formulates the task as an unsupervised optimization problem, allowing for efficient output of meshes with user-defined cell counts. The approach significantly reduces training times and meshing overhead compared to tradit

title: DreamScene4D: Dynamic Multi-Object Scene Generation from Monocular Videos
figure: First approach to generate 3D dynamic scenes of multiple objects from monocular videos via 360-degree novel view synthesis
abstract: DreamScene4D introduces a novel method for generating 3D dynamic scenes from monocular videos, addressing challenges in rendering and object motion recovery. By decomposing scenes into background and object tracks, the model effectively synthesizes multi-object dynamics and provides accurate 2D persistent point tracking. The approach shows promising results on various video datasets and aims to ad

title: Part-aware Shape Generation with Latent 3D Diffusion of Neural Voxel Fields
figure: First latent 3D diffusion model for part-aware shape generation via neural voxel fields
abstract: This paper introduces a latent 3D diffusion model for generating neural voxel fields with a focus on part-aware structures. It features a novel diffusion process for high-resolution generation and a part-aware shape decoder for accurate part decomposition. Extensive experiments show its superior generative capabilities compared to existing methods.

title: Lightplane: Highly-Scalable Components for Neural 3D Fields
figure: First scalable components for 3D neural fields that reduce memory usage in 2D-3D mapping.
abstract: The paper introduces Lightplane Render and Splatter, components that enhance the efficiency of 2D-3D mapping in neural fields, allowing for higher resolution image processing with reduced memory costs. These innovations support various applications, including 3D reconstruction and generation.

title: MicroDreamer: Efficient 3D Generation in $\sim$20 Seconds by Score-based Iterative Reconstruction
figure: First efficient 3D generation method that reduces NFEs via score-based iterative reconstruction.
abstract: MicroDreamer introduces score-based iterative reconstruction (SIR) to enhance the efficiency of 3D generation, achieving significant speed improvements while maintaining performance. It optimizes 3D parameters in pixel space and is applicable to various 3D representations, generating meshes in about 20 seconds on a single GPU.

title: Grounded Compositional and Diverse Text-to-3D with Pretrained Multi-View Diffusion Model
figure: First method to generate compositional 3D assets from text prompts using a pre-trained multi-view diffusion model.
abstract: This paper presents Grounded-Dreamer, a two-stage approach for generating 3D assets that accurately follow complex text prompts. It utilizes a pre-trained multi-view diffusion model and introduces an attention refocusing mechanism to enhance text alignment in 4-view image generation. The method outperforms previous state-of-the-art techniques in quality and accuracy, enabling diverse 3D outputs fr

title: Multi-view Image Prompted Multi-view Diffusion for Improved 3D Generation
figure: First multi-view image prompted diffusion model for enhanced 3D object generation
abstract: This paper explores the use of multiple image prompts for 3D generation, building on the ImageDream model. The proposed MultiImageDream method shows improved performance in generating multi-view and 3D objects compared to using a single image prompt, validated through various evaluation metrics.

title: Interactive3D: Create What You Want by Interactive 3D Generation
figure: First interactive 3D generation framework that allows precise user control via extensive 3D interaction capabilities
abstract: Interactive3D is a novel framework for interactive 3D object generation that enhances user control through extensive interaction capabilities. It operates in two stages, first using Gaussian Splatting for direct modifications and then refining the geometry with InstantNGP. The approach significantly improves the controllability and quality of generated 3D objects.

title: A Hybrid Generative and Discriminative PointNet on Unordered Point Sets
figure: First hybrid Generative and Discriminative PointNet for point cloud classification and generation.
abstract: This paper introduces GDPNet, a hybrid model that combines generative and discriminative capabilities for point cloud classification and generation. It builds on the Joint Energy-based Model framework, achieving strong performance in generating point clouds while retaining the discriminative power of PointNet classifiers.

title: Gaussian Splatting Decoder for 3D-aware Generative Adversarial Networks
figure: First approach that combines NeRF-based GANs with 3D Gaussian Splatting via a decoder.
abstract: This paper presents a novel method that integrates the high rendering quality of NeRF-based GANs with the efficiency of 3D Gaussian Splatting. By training a decoder to map implicit NeRF representations to explicit 3D Gaussian attributes, it enables high-resolution GAN inversion and real-time editing of 3D scenes.

title: CorrespondentDream: Enhancing 3D Fidelity of Text-to-3D using Cross-View Correspondences
figure: First method to enhance 3D fidelity in text-to-3D via cross-view correspondences.
abstract: CorrespondentDream addresses the issue of 3D geometric fidelity in text-to-3D models by utilizing cross-view correspondences from a diffusion U-Net. This approach improves the coherence of generated geometries, resulting in smoother object surfaces and higher fidelity in NeRF models, as validated by qualitative results and user studies.

title: RealmDreamer: Text-Driven 3D Scene Generation with Inpainting and Depth Diffusion
figure: First method for text-driven 3D scene generation using inpainting and depth diffusion.
abstract: RealmDreamer generates 3D scenes from text descriptions by optimizing a 3D Gaussian Splatting representation. It combines 2D inpainting diffusion models with depth diffusion for high-fidelity geometry, allowing for synthesis from single images without requiring multi-view data. The method shows superior performance in user studies.

title: InstantMesh: Efficient 3D Mesh Generation from a Single Image with Sparse-view Large Reconstruction Models
figure: First efficient 3D mesh generation from a single image via a feed-forward framework.
abstract: InstantMesh is a feed-forward framework that generates 3D meshes from a single image, achieving high quality and scalability. It combines a multiview diffusion model with a sparse-view reconstruction model, allowing for rapid creation of diverse 3D assets. The framework includes a differentiable iso-surface extraction module for improved training efficiency. Experimental results show significant p

title: DreamScene360: Unconstrained Text-to-3D Scene Generation with Panoramic Gaussian Splatting
figure: First text-to-3D scene generation pipeline using panoramic Gaussian splatting.
abstract: DreamScene360 introduces a text-to-3D scene generation pipeline that creates immersive 360° scenes quickly. It leverages a 2D diffusion model to generate a coherent panoramic image, which is then transformed into 3D Gaussians for real-time exploration. The method ensures consistent 3D geometry by optimizing a point cloud derived from monocular depth, addressing challenges of single-view inputs.

title: UDiFF: Generating Conditional Unsigned Distance Fields with Optimal Wavelet Diffusion
figure: First diffusion model for generating unsigned distance fields with optimal wavelet transformation.
abstract: UDiFF introduces a 3D diffusion model for generating unsigned distance fields, enabling the creation of textured 3D shapes with open surfaces from text conditions or unconditionally. It employs an optimal wavelet transformation to enhance representation space, overcoming limitations of previous models that only handled closed surfaces. The method shows significant advantages in both numerical and

title: Urban Architect: Steerable 3D Urban Scene Generation with Layout Prior
figure: First text-to-3D urban scene generator that incorporates layout prior via score distillation.
abstract: This paper presents a novel approach to text-to-3D generation for urban scenes by introducing a compositional 3D layout representation. It enhances model optimization through Layout-Guided Variational Score Distillation and utilizes a Scalable Hash Grid structure to manage the complexity of large-scale urban environments. The framework demonstrates the ability to generate and edit extensive urban

title: DreamView: Injecting View-specific Text Guidance into Text-to-3D Generation
figure: First text-to-3D generation method that enables multi-view customization via score distillation sampling.
abstract: DreamView enhances text-to-3D generation by allowing customization of 3D objects from specific viewpoints while maintaining overall consistency. It uses a collaborative text guidance injection module to balance view-specific and overall text inputs, trained on large-scale multi-view images. This approach fosters creative design of diverse 3D assets. Code will be available on GitHub.

title: Learning 3D-Aware GANs from Unposed Images with Template Feature Field
figure: First 3D-aware GAN that learns from unposed images via template feature field.
abstract: This paper presents a method for learning 3D-aware GANs from unposed images by estimating camera poses on-the-fly using a learned template feature field. The approach combines a generative radiance field with 2D semantic features to create a canonical 3D feature template, improving pose estimation efficiency and performance on various datasets.

title: Taming Transformers for Realistic Lidar Point Cloud Generation
figure: First generative model for realistic Lidar point cloud generation using auto-regressive transformers
abstract: LidarGRIT is a generative model that enhances Lidar point cloud generation by using auto-regressive transformers to sample range images in the latent space. It addresses the challenge of modeling Lidar raydrop noise effectively, achieving superior performance on benchmark datasets. The model incorporates VQ-VAE for decoding range images and raydrop masks.

title: LGSDF: Continual Global Learning of Signed Distance Fields Aided by Local Updating
figure: First continual global learning algorithm for signed distance fields aided by local updating.
abstract: LGSDF introduces a continual global learning algorithm for Euclidean Signed Distance Fields (ESDF) that improves map accuracy by dynamically updating grids with sensor observations and employing a self-supervised learning approach. The method outperforms existing mapping algorithms in generating smooth and continuous maps and meshes across various scenes.

title: NeRF2Points: Large-Scale Point Cloud Generation From Street Views' Radiance Field Optimization
figure: First tailored NeRF variant for urban point cloud synthesis from RGB inputs.
abstract: NeRF2Points introduces a novel approach to generate high-quality point clouds from street-view imagery using a customized NeRF variant. It addresses challenges in camera pose accuracy and the unique characteristics of urban environments, resulting in coherent point cloud representations. The method leverages a high-resolution dataset for evaluation.

title: Diffusion Time-step Curriculum for One Image to 3D Generation
figure: First one-image-to-3D generation method using a time-step curriculum via score distillation.
abstract: The paper introduces DTC123, a novel pipeline for generating 3D models from a single image by optimizing the treatment of diffusion time-steps. It addresses issues in existing score distillation sampling methods, leading to improved multi-view consistency and quality in 3D asset generation. Extensive experiments validate its effectiveness, and code will be available on GitHub.

title: Idea23D: Collaborative LMM Agents Enable 3D Model Generation from Interleaved Multimodal Inputs
figure: First framework that generates 3D models from multimodal inputs via collaborative LMM agents
abstract: Idea23D introduces a novel approach for generating 3D models from multimodal inputs, combining text, images, and 3D models. The framework utilizes three collaborative agents based on large multimodal models to automate the generation process, significantly improving the accuracy and success rate of 3D content creation. A new dataset, Eval3DAIGC-198, is introduced to evaluate the generated models a

title: DreamScene: 3D Gaussian-based Text-to-3D Scene Generation via Formation Pattern Sampling
figure: First 3D Gaussian-based text-to-3D scene generation framework via Formation Pattern Sampling.
abstract: DreamScene introduces a novel framework for text-to-3D scene generation that addresses quality, consistency, and editing flexibility challenges. It utilizes Formation Pattern Sampling for high-quality representations and a progressive camera sampling strategy for scene-wide consistency. The method enhances scene editing by integrating objects and environments, demonstrating superior performance ov

title: LidarDM: Generative LiDAR Simulation in a Generated World
figure: First LiDAR generative model that produces realistic 4D point clouds via latent diffusion.
abstract: LidarDM is a novel generative model for creating realistic, layout-aware, and temporally coherent LiDAR videos. It integrates a 4D world generation framework and employs latent diffusion models to generate 3D scenes, enabling the production of realistic sensory observations. The model shows superior performance in realism and temporal consistency compared to existing methods.

title: Enhancing Diffusion-based Point Cloud Generation with Smoothness Constraint
figure: First point cloud generator that incorporates local smoothness constraints via diffusion.
abstract: This paper presents a diffusion-based model for point cloud generation that integrates a local smoothness constraint to improve the quality of generated shapes. The approach addresses issues of non-smooth points on surfaces, leading to more realistic and smoother point clouds, as demonstrated through experiments against state-of-the-art methods.

title: Diffusion$^2$: Dynamic 3D Content Generation via Score Composition of Video and Multi-view Diffusion Models
figure: First framework for dynamic 3D content creation via score composition of video and multi-view diffusion models
abstract: Diffusion^2 introduces a novel framework for dynamic 3D content generation by combining geometric consistency and temporal smoothness from video and multi-view diffusion models. It enables the sampling of dense multi-view multi-frame images for optimizing continuous 4D representation, achieving efficient generation of 4D assets without relying on extensive 4D data.

title: Grounding and Enhancing Grid-based Models for Neural Fields
figure: First systematic analysis of grid-based models for neural fields via GTK framework
abstract: This paper presents a theoretical framework for grid-based models in neural fields, focusing on grid tangent kernels (GTK) that influence their performance. It introduces a new model, MulFAGrid, which shows improved generalization and state-of-the-art results in tasks like 3D signed distance field reconstruction and novel view synthesis.

title: GaussianCube: A Structured and Explicit Radiance Representation for 3D Generative Modeling
figure: First structured and explicit radiance representation for 3D generative modeling via Gaussian fitting.
abstract: GaussianCube introduces a structured and explicit radiance representation that enhances 3D generative modeling. It employs a novel Gaussian fitting algorithm and integrates with 3D diffusion methods, achieving high-quality results with fewer parameters. The model excels in unconditional and class-conditioned object generation, as well as text-to-3D synthesis, demonstrating its versatility and accu

title: NeuSDFusion: A Spatial-Aware Generative Model for 3D Shape Completion, Reconstruction, and Generation
figure: First spatial-aware 3D shape generation framework leveraging 2D plane representations via a hybrid shape representation technique.
abstract: This paper presents a novel spatial-aware framework for 3D shape generation that utilizes 2D plane representations to enhance modeling. It incorporates a hybrid shape representation to learn continuous signed distance fields and enforces spatial correspondences using a transformer-based autoencoder. The method excels in various tasks, including unconditional shape generation and text-to-shape synt

title: DreamPolisher: Towards High-Quality Text-to-3D Generation via Geometric Diffusion
figure: First text-to-3D generation method that ensures geometric consistency via Gaussian Splatting.
abstract: DreamPolisher introduces a Gaussian Splatting method with geometric guidance for high-quality text-to-3D generation. It addresses view-consistency and texture richness issues in existing methods by refining a coarse 3D generation through geometric optimization and a ControlNet driven refiner. Evaluations show its effectiveness in generating realistic 3D objects aligned with textual prompts.

title: VP3D: Unleashing 2D Visual Prompt for Text-to-3D Generation
figure: First text-to-3D generation model that utilizes 2D visual prompts to enhance visual fidelity via SDS.
abstract: VP3D introduces a novel approach to text-to-3D generation by leveraging 2D visual prompts to improve the quality of generated 3D models. By generating high-quality images from text prompts and using them to guide the optimization process, VP3D enhances visual fidelity and texture detail in the resulting 3D models. The method also allows for stylized text-to-3D generation when using reference image

title: Comp4D: LLM-Guided Compositional 4D Scene Generation
figure: First framework for compositional 4D scene generation using LLMs and diffusion models
abstract: Comp4D introduces a novel approach to 4D scene generation by separately constructing each 4D object within a scene based on input text prompts. It utilizes Large Language Models to decompose prompts and employs score distillation with pre-trained diffusion models to enhance visual quality and object interactions, outperforming existing methods.

title: LATTE3D: Large-scale Amortized Text-To-Enhanced3D Synthesis
figure: First method to achieve fast, high-quality text-to-3D synthesis via amortized neural field and textured surface generation.
abstract: LATTE3D improves text-to-3D generation by addressing the limitations of previous amortized methods, enabling fast and high-quality synthesis of 3D objects. It utilizes a scalable architecture and 3D-aware diffusion priors to enhance robustness and detail, achieving generation in 400ms with the potential for further optimization.

title: ThemeStation: Generating Theme-Aware 3D Assets from Few Exemplars
figure: First theme-aware 3D-to-3D generation method using dual score distillation.
abstract: ThemeStation introduces a novel approach for generating theme-aware 3D assets from a few exemplars. It aims to create 3D models that align with the theme of the input exemplars while ensuring diversity. The method employs a two-stage framework and a dual score distillation loss to enhance the quality and variation of the generated models, outperforming previous methods in user studies.

title: DreamFlow: High-Quality Text-to-3D Generation by Approximating Probability Flow
figure: First text-to-3D generation method that enhances optimization via probability flow approximation
abstract: DreamFlow introduces a novel three-stage text-to-3D optimization framework that improves the generation speed and quality of 3D content by leveraging a predetermined timestep schedule in the generative sampling process. It demonstrates significant improvements in both speed and photorealism compared to existing methods.

title: STAG4D: Spatial-Temporal Anchored Generative 4D Gaussians
figure: First framework for high-fidelity 4D generation via dynamic 3D Gaussian splatting and diffusion models
abstract: STAG4D introduces a novel framework for high-fidelity 4D content creation by combining pre-trained diffusion models with dynamic 3D Gaussian splatting. It ensures spatial-temporal consistency in generated sequences using a multi-view diffusion model and a fusion strategy for self-attention. The method optimizes 4D Gaussian point clouds without requiring pre-training, achieving state-of-the-art res

title: GRM: Large Gaussian Reconstruction Model for Efficient 3D Reconstruction and Generation
figure: First large-scale Gaussian reconstruction model that enables efficient 3D generation via multi-view information.
abstract: GRM is a feed-forward transformer model that reconstructs 3D assets from sparse-view images quickly. It uses pixel-aligned Gaussians to represent scenes and demonstrates potential in generative tasks like text-to-3D and image-to-3D by integrating with diffusion models. The method shows superior reconstruction quality and efficiency compared to alternatives.

title: DreamReward: Text-to-3D Generation with Human Preference
figure: First text-to-3D generation framework that incorporates human preference feedback via a reward model.
abstract: DreamReward introduces a framework for text-to-3D generation that enhances model performance by integrating human preference feedback. It includes a novel reward model, Reward3D, and a tuning algorithm, DreamFL, to optimize diffusion models. The approach aims to improve the alignment of generated 3D content with human intentions, demonstrating significant advancements in fidelity and consistency.
