title: Compress3D: a Compressed Latent Space for 3D Generation from a Single Image
figure: First 3D generation method from a single image using a triplane latent space and diffusion model.
abstract: This paper introduces Compress3D, a triplane autoencoder that compresses 3D geometry and texture into a latent space for efficient 3D generation from a single image. It employs a 3D-aware cross-attention mechanism and trains a diffusion model on the refined latent space, achieving superior performance with less training data and time.

title: Text-to-3D Shape Generation
figure: First comprehensive survey on text-to-3D shape generation methods and technologies.
abstract: This state-of-the-art report surveys the advancements in text-to-3D shape generation, highlighting the technologies and methods that enable non-expert users to create 3D content from text. It categorizes recent work based on supervision data and discusses existing limitations and future directions.

title: GVGEN: Text-to-3D Generation with Volumetric Representation
figure: First text-to-3D generation framework using structured volumetric representation via diffusion.
abstract: GVGEN introduces a diffusion-based framework for generating 3D Gaussian representations from text. It features a structured volumetric representation and a coarse-to-fine generation pipeline, enhancing detail fidelity and maintaining fast generation speeds. The method outperforms existing 3D generation techniques in both quality and efficiency.

title: Planner3D: LLM-enhanced graph prior meets 3D indoor scene explicit regularization
figure: First method to enhance 3D indoor scene generation using LLM and graph priors.
abstract: This paper presents Planner3D, a method for generating realistic 3D indoor scenes from scene graphs by integrating large language models with graph features. It addresses limitations in shape diversity and layout collisions in conventional methods, achieving improved scene-level fidelity through joint layout-shape generation and explicit regularization.

title: SC-Diff: 3D Shape Completion with Latent Diffusion Models
figure: First 3D shape completion framework using latent diffusion with multimodal conditioning
abstract: SC-Diff introduces a 3D shape completion framework that combines 2D images and 3D partial scans using a latent diffusion model. It represents shapes as Truncated Signed Distance Functions and utilizes a discrete latent space for efficient processing. The model improves robustness and generalization across object categories, achieving significant reductions in reconstruction error compared to exist

title: Precise-Physics Driven Text-to-3D Generation
figure: First text-to-3D generation that incorporates precise physics perception via 3D diffusion models
abstract: Phy3DGen addresses the limitations of existing text-to-3D generation methods by integrating precise physics perception into the generation process. It utilizes 3D diffusion models and a differentiable physics layer to optimize 3D shapes, ensuring they conform to the laws of physics while maintaining geometric plausibility. This approach enhances the practicality of generated 3D shapes for real-wor

title: ComboVerse: Compositional 3D Assets Creation Using Spatially-Aware Diffusion Guidance
figure: First framework that generates compositional 3D assets using spatially-aware diffusion guidance.
abstract: ComboVerse is a 3D generation framework that creates high-quality 3D assets with complex compositions by combining multiple models. It addresses the 'multi-object gap' and automates the positioning of objects using spatially-aware score distillation sampling from pretrained diffusion models, achieving improved accuracy in generating compositional 3D assets.

title: VFusion3D: Learning Scalable 3D Generative Models from Video Diffusion Models
figure: First scalable 3D generative model leveraging video diffusion models for multi-view data generation.
abstract: VFusion3D introduces a method for creating scalable 3D generative models by utilizing pre-trained video diffusion models. It addresses the scarcity of 3D data by generating a large-scale synthetic multi-view dataset, enabling the model to produce 3D assets from single images rapidly and outperform existing models.

title: Generic 3D Diffusion Adapter Using Controlled Multi-View Editing
figure: First 3D diffusion model that enables controlled multi-view editing via ancestral sampling
abstract: MVEdit addresses the challenges in open-domain 3D object synthesis by proposing a 3D Adapter that ensures 3D consistency and high-quality textured meshes. It leverages multi-view diffusion and allows for text/image-to-3D generation and 3D-to-3D editing, achieving a balance between quality and speed. The method also facilitates fine-tuning of 2D latent diffusion models for small 3D datasets.

title: LN3DIFF++: Scalable Latent Neural Fields Diffusion for Speedy 3D Generation
figure: First scalable latent neural fields diffusion model for fast 3D generation via VAE.
abstract: LN3Diff++ introduces a novel framework for fast and high-quality conditional 3D generation using a 3D-aware architecture and VAE. It encodes input images into a 3D latent space and decodes them into a 3D neural field, achieving state-of-the-art performance on ShapeNet and improving inference speed without per-instance optimization.

title: VideoMV: Consistent Multi-View Generation Based on Large Video Generative Model
figure: First multi-view generation model that ensures consistency via video generative models
abstract: This paper presents VideoMV, a framework for generating multi-view images from text or single-image prompts, enhancing consistency through a 3D-Aware Denoising Sampling method. It utilizes video generative models for training, allowing for better multi-view consistency and faster convergence in training compared to existing methods. The approach also enables quick creation of 3D assets represented

title: SV3D: Novel Multi-view Synthesis and 3D Generation from a Single Image using Latent Video Diffusion
figure: First latent video diffusion model for high-resolution image-to-multi-view 3D generation.
abstract: SV3D introduces a latent video diffusion model that enhances 3D object generation from single images by enabling novel multi-view synthesis. It addresses limitations of previous methods by ensuring multi-view consistency and providing explicit camera control, leading to improved performance in 3D reconstruction and generation.

title: GetMesh: A Controllable Model for High-quality Mesh Generation and Manipulation
figure: First controllable model for high-quality mesh generation and manipulation via latent point representation.
abstract: GetMesh is a generative model designed for mesh generation and manipulation, allowing fine-grained control over the process. It utilizes a varying number of points as latent representation and reorganizes them into a triplane format, enabling the generation of detailed meshes and intuitive adjustments to mesh topology and parts across categories.

title: Urban Scene Diffusion through Semantic Occupancy Map
figure: First 3D diffusion model that generates urban scenes conditioned on a Bird's-Eye View map.
abstract: UrbanDiffusion is a 3D diffusion model designed to generate detailed urban scenes by utilizing a Bird's-Eye View map. It captures the geometry and semantics of various man-made objects, allowing for the creation of diverse urban environments. The model learns the distribution of scene-level structures and can expand synthesized scenes to arbitrary scales, demonstrating its effectiveness on real-wo

title: BrightDreamer: Generic 3D Gaussian Generative Framework for Fast Text-to-3D Synthesis
figure: First end-to-end feed-forward framework for fast text-to-3D generation via Gaussian representation
abstract: BrightDreamer introduces a fast text-to-3D synthesis method that utilizes a feed-forward approach to generate 3D Gaussian representations. It overcomes the inefficiencies of existing methods by predicting 3D deformations from an anchor shape and employing a novel triplane generator. The method achieves high rendering speeds and demonstrates strong semantic understanding for complex prompts.

title: Exploiting Topological Priors for Boosting Point Cloud Generation
figure: Enhancement of SP-GAN for point cloud generation using topological priors.
abstract: This paper enhances the SP-GAN model for point cloud generation by incorporating topological priors, improving the structural integrity and quality of generated point clouds. It uses K-means to segment point clouds into clusters, extracting centroids as priors, which boosts global feature learning and coherence in the generated outputs.

title: Isotropic3D: Image-to-3D Generation Based on a Single CLIP Embedding
figure: First image-to-3D generation pipeline using only a single CLIP embedding via Score Distillation Sampling.
abstract: Isotropic3D presents a novel image-to-3D generation pipeline that utilizes a single image CLIP embedding, optimizing the process to produce consistent multi-view images and a 3D model with improved geometry and texture. The method fine-tunes a text-to-3D diffusion model to enhance image-to-image capabilities, resulting in less distortion compared to existing methods. The project and code are avail

title: RangeLDM: Fast Realistic LiDAR Point Cloud Generation
figure: First rapid LiDAR point cloud generator using latent diffusion models.
abstract: RangeLDM is a novel method for quickly generating high-quality LiDAR point clouds using latent diffusion models. It addresses the challenges of realism and speed in existing generative models by correcting data distribution and employing a range-guided discriminator. Experimental results show its effectiveness on standard datasets.

title: Controllable Text-to-3D Generation via Surface-Aligned Gaussian Splatting
figure: First controllable text-to-3D generation method via surface-aligned Gaussian splatting
abstract: This work introduces MVControl, a novel architecture for controllable text-to-3D generation that enhances multi-view diffusion models with additional input conditions. It employs a hybrid diffusion guidance method and 3D Gaussians for efficient geometry representation, enabling the generation of high-quality 3D content. Extensive experiments show robust generalization capabilities.

title: 3D-SceneDreamer: Text-Driven 3D-Consistent Scene Generation
figure: First text-driven 3D scene generation that refines local views with global 3D information via a generative refinement network.
abstract: 3D-SceneDreamer enhances text-driven 3D scene generation by refining local views with global 3D information, using a tri-plane features-based NeRF for consistency. It improves visual quality and supports diverse scene generation and camera trajectories, addressing limitations of existing methods.

title: Hyper-3DG: Text-to-3D Gaussian Generation via Hypergraph
figure: First text-to-3D generation method that captures high-order correlations via hypergraph.
abstract: Hyper-3DG introduces a novel approach for text-to-3D generation that addresses issues like over-smoothness and over-saturation by utilizing a hypergraph framework. It refines 3D Gaussian representations and enhances the quality of generated 3D objects without increasing computational costs. The method shows significant improvements in generating detailed 3D models from textual descriptions.

title: Sculpt3D: Multi-View Consistent Text-to-3D Generation with Sparse 3D Prior
figure: First text-to-3D generation method ensuring multi-view consistency via 3D priors.
abstract: Sculpt3D addresses inconsistencies in text-to-3D generation by integrating 3D priors from reference objects without retraining the 2D diffusion model. It utilizes keypoints supervision and a sparse ray sampling approach to enhance 3D geometry quality and multi-view consistency while maintaining the fidelity of the 2D model's output. Experiments demonstrate significant improvements in generated obj

title: SemCity: Semantic Scene Generation with Triplane Diffusion
figure: First 3D diffusion model for generating real-world outdoor scenes using triplane representation
abstract: SemCity introduces a 3D diffusion model aimed at generating semantic outdoor scenes from real-world datasets. It addresses challenges posed by empty spaces in outdoor data by utilizing a triplane representation. The model supports various tasks like scene inpainting and completion, demonstrating improved generation results on the SemanticKITTI dataset. The method also allows for manipulation of sc

title: V3D: Video Diffusion Models are Effective 3D Generators
figure: First video diffusion model that generates high-quality 3D shapes via multi-view consistency.
abstract: V3D leverages video diffusion models for effective 3D generation, introducing geometrical consistency to enhance detail and speed. It generates high-quality meshes or 3D Gaussians from single images and extends to scene-level novel view synthesis, demonstrating superior performance in generation quality and multi-view consistency. Code is available at GitHub.

title: MagicClay: Sculpting Meshes With Generative Neural Fields
figure: First tool for sculpting meshes with generative neural fields via hybrid representation.
abstract: MagicClay introduces a hybrid approach that combines mesh and Signed Distance Field (SDF) representations for shape generation. It allows artists to sculpt mesh regions based on textual prompts while maintaining consistency between representations. The framework enhances geometry generation and enables sequential prompt-based edits, demonstrating superior results compared to existing methods.

title: 3DTopia: Large Text-to-3D Generation Model with Hybrid Diffusion Priors
figure: First text-to-3D generation model using hybrid diffusion priors for high-quality asset creation
abstract: 3DTopia is a two-stage text-to-3D generation system that produces high-quality general 3D assets in 5 minutes. It employs a text-conditioned tri-plane latent diffusion model for initial coarse generation, followed by a refinement stage using 2D diffusion priors for texture enhancement. The system is trained on a cleaned and captioned version of the Objaverse dataset, with performance results provi

title: ViewDiff: 3D-Consistent Image Generation with Text-to-Image Models
figure: First method to generate 3D-consistent images using text-to-image models via autoregressive generation.
abstract: ViewDiff introduces a novel approach for 3D asset generation by leveraging pretrained text-to-image models to create multi-view images in a single denoising process. By integrating 3D volume-rendering and cross-frame-attention layers into the U-Net architecture, the method achieves high-quality, 3D-consistent images from real-world data, outperforming existing techniques in visual quality.

title: G3DR: Generative 3D Reconstruction in ImageNet
figure: First method that generates diverse 3D objects from single images via depth regularization and language-vision model.
abstract: G3DR is a novel 3D generative method that creates high-quality 3D objects from single images, utilizing a depth regularization technique and a pretrained language-vision model to enhance visual realism and geometric fidelity. It offers efficient 3D asset generation based on class or text conditioning and outperforms existing methods in perceptual and geometry metrics while reducing training time.

title: HyperSDFusion: Bridging Hierarchical Structures in Language and Geometry for Enhanced 3D Text2Shape Generation
figure: First method to explore hyperbolic hierarchical representation for text-to-shape generation via a dual-branch diffusion model
abstract: HyperSDFusion introduces a dual-branch diffusion model for generating 3D shapes from text, leveraging hierarchical structures in both text and geometry. By utilizing hyperbolic space for representation, it enhances the learning of hierarchical features, achieving state-of-the-art results on the Text2Shape dataset. The implementation is available at HyperSDFusion.github.io.

title: A Quantitative Evaluation of Score Distillation Sampling Based Text-to-3D
figure: First quantitative evaluation of score distillation sampling for text-to-3D generation.
abstract: This paper evaluates the score distillation sampling method for generating 3D content from text prompts, addressing artifacts and inaccuracies in generated models. It proposes objective metrics for evaluation and introduces a baseline model that improves performance on these metrics while mitigating identified issues.

title: GEM3D: GEnerative Medial Abstractions for 3D Shape Synthesis
figure: First topology-aware generative model for 3D shape synthesis via denoising diffusion.
abstract: GEM3D introduces a deep generative model for 3D shapes using a neural skeleton-based representation. It employs a denoising diffusion model to generate skeletons and surfaces, achieving improved topological and geometric accuracy. The method shows significant advancements in shape synthesis and point cloud reconstruction, outperforming existing models in generating complex shapes.

title: Disentangled 3D Scene Generation with Layout Learning
figure: First method to generate disentangled 3D scenes with layout learning via NeRFs
abstract: This paper presents a novel approach for generating 3D scenes that are decomposed into individual objects using unsupervised learning. By optimizing multiple NeRFs and layouts, the method enables the creation of valid scene configurations, enhancing text-to-3D content generation capabilities.

title: Geometry-Informed Neural Networks
figure: First framework for training shape-generative neural fields without data via user-specified design requirements.
abstract: The paper presents geometry-informed neural networks (GINNs), a novel framework for generating shapes without large datasets by using user-defined objectives and constraints. GINNs can produce diverse solutions and control geometrical properties, demonstrating potential for generative design in various fields.

title: Pushing Auto-regressive Models for 3D Shape Generation at Capacity and Scalability
figure: First auto-regressive model for scalable 3D shape generation via discrete representation learning
abstract: This paper extends auto-regressive models to 3D shape generation, introducing Argus3D, which improves capacity and scalability. By utilizing a large dataset of 900,000 objects and a novel discrete representation learning approach, the model effectively synthesizes diverse 3D shapes while reducing computational costs. Extensive experiments show its capability across multiple generation tasks.

title: DUDF: Differentiable Unsigned Distance Fields with Hyperbolic Scaling
figure: First differentiable unsigned distance fields with hyperbolic scaling for improved 3D reconstruction.
abstract: This paper introduces a method for learning hyperbolic scaling of unsigned distance fields to enhance the representation of open surfaces in 3D reconstruction. The approach integrates with implicit neural networks, improving reconstruction quality and training performance while enabling accurate computation of topological properties. Extensive experiments show significant accuracy and speed improv

title: IM-3D: Iterative Multiview Diffusion and Reconstruction for High-Quality 3D Generation
figure: First text-to-3D model that integrates multi-view video generation with Gaussian splatting for high-quality 3D outputs.
abstract: The paper presents IM-3D, a method that enhances text-to-3D generation by utilizing multi-view video generators and a 3D reconstruction algorithm. This approach significantly improves the quality and efficiency of generating 3D objects, reducing the number of evaluations of the 2D generator and yielding more usable 3D assets.

title: LISR: Learning Linear 3D Implicit Surface Representation Using Compactly Supported Radial Basis Functions
figure: First linear implicit surface representation using compactly supported radial basis functions for 3D shape generation.
abstract: This paper presents a method for implicit 3D surface reconstruction from partial and noisy point clouds using locally supported compact radial basis functions. The proposed neural network architecture learns linear implicit shapes guided by ground truth SDF data, achieving improved performance in shape completion tasks compared to existing methods.

title: GALA3D: Towards Text-to-3D Complex Scene Generation via Layout-guided Generative Gaussian Splatting
figure: First text-to-3D scene generator using layout-guided generative Gaussian splatting.
abstract: GALA3D introduces a layout-guided generative approach for text-to-3D scene generation, utilizing large language models to create initial layouts and a Gaussian representation for 3D content. It features a compositional optimization mechanism that ensures realistic scenes with coherent geometry and interactions among objects, while allowing for controllable editing. The framework aims for high fide

title: LGM: Large Multi-View Gaussian Model for High-Resolution 3D Content Creation
figure: First high-resolution 3D model generator using multi-view Gaussian features via diffusion.
abstract: The Large Multi-View Gaussian Model (LGM) framework generates high-resolution 3D models from text prompts or single-view images. It utilizes multi-view Gaussian features for efficient representation and an asymmetric U-Net for processing, achieving fast generation speeds while maintaining high fidelity and resolution.

title: Retrieval-Augmented Score Distillation for Text-to-3D Generation
figure: First retrieval-augmented score distillation method for text-to-3D generation.
abstract: ReDream introduces a novel framework for text-to-3D generation that enhances geometric consistency by incorporating semantically relevant 3D assets into the optimization process. This approach leverages the strengths of 2D diffusion models while addressing the limitations of 3D data, resulting in improved quality and fidelity of generated scenes.

title: CNS-Edit: 3D Shape Editing via Coupled Neural Shape Optimization
figure: First 3D shape editing method using coupled neural shape representation and optimization.
abstract: CNS-Edit presents a novel approach for 3D shape editing through a coupled representation and neural volume optimization. It introduces a coupled neural shape representation that captures global semantics and provides spatial context for local changes. The method includes various editing operators and demonstrates superior performance in achieving complex editing results compared to existing method

title: Can Shape-Infused Joint Embeddings Improve Image-Conditioned 3D Diffusion?
figure: First method to enhance 3D shape synthesis from images via CLIP-guided diffusion.
abstract: This study presents CISP, a method that improves 3D shape generation from 2D images by aligning them in a shared embedding space. It enhances the coherence of generated shapes with input images while matching the quality and diversity of existing CLIP-guided models, suggesting a new direction for integrating 3D knowledge into generative processes.

title: AToM: Amortized Text-to-Mesh using 2D Diffusion
figure: First text-to-mesh framework that generates high-quality meshes in under 1 second via amortized optimization.
abstract: AToM is a feed-forward text-to-mesh framework that generates high-quality textured meshes quickly and efficiently. It utilizes a novel triplane-based architecture and a two-stage optimization strategy, significantly outperforming existing methods in accuracy and generalizability across various text prompts.

title: Geometry aware 3D generation from in-the-wild images in ImageNet
figure: First method to generate 3D geometry from unstructured images using a triplane representation.
abstract: This paper presents a method for generating 3D models from the unstructured ImageNet dataset without requiring camera pose information. By utilizing a triplane representation and modifying the StyleGAN2 architecture, the approach enables class-conditional 3D model generation and rendering from arbitrary viewpoints, showing significant improvements over existing methods.

title: Topology-Aware Latent Diffusion for 3D Shape Generation
figure: First model that integrates latent diffusion with persistent homology for diverse 3D shape generation.
abstract: This paper presents a generative model that combines latent diffusion with persistent homology to generate diverse 3D shapes while emphasizing their topological features. The method uses implicit fields and a transformer-based autoencoder to embed shapes into latent vectors, which are then navigated through a diffusion model. The framework supports various input types, allowing for flexible shape

title: BlockFusion: Expandable 3D Scene Generation using Latent Tri-plane Extrapolation
figure: First expandable 3D scene generation model using latent tri-plane extrapolation via diffusion.
abstract: BlockFusion is a diffusion-based model that generates and extends 3D scenes using unit blocks. It employs a hybrid neural field approach with tri-planes for geometry features and a variational auto-encoder for latent space compression. The model allows for high-quality, diverse scene generation and seamless expansion by extrapolating existing latent representations, achieving geometrically consist

title: BoostDream: Efficient Refining for High-Quality Text-to-3D Generation from Multi-View Diffusion
figure: First efficient refining method for high-quality text-to-3D generation via multi-view diffusion.
abstract: BoostDream presents a novel 3D refining method that enhances the quality of text-to-3D generated assets. It integrates feed-forward generation with Score Distillation Sampling (SDS) to produce high-fidelity 3D models efficiently. The framework includes 3D model distillation, a multi-view SDS loss, and guidance using normal maps, significantly improving the speed and quality of 3D asset generation.

title: Sketch2NeRF: Multi-view Sketch-guided Text-to-3D Generation
figure: First multi-view sketch-guided text-to-3D generation framework via NeRF optimization
abstract: Sketch2NeRF introduces a framework for text-to-3D generation that incorporates multi-view sketches to enhance control over the generated 3D content. By leveraging pretrained 2D diffusion models, the method optimizes a 3D scene represented by a neural radiance field, achieving high fidelity and fine-grained control in the synthesis of 3D objects.

title: DDMI: Domain-Agnostic Latent Diffusion Models for Synthesizing High-Quality Implicit Neural Representations
figure: First domain-agnostic latent diffusion model for synthesizing high-quality implicit neural representations.
abstract: DDMI introduces a novel approach for generating high-quality implicit neural representations (INRs) using adaptive positional embeddings. It connects discrete data with continuous signal functions through a Discrete-to-continuous space Variational AutoEncoder (D2C-VAE) and enhances expressive power with a new conditioning mechanism. The model shows superior performance across various modalities, i

title: Sat2Scene: 3D Urban Scene Generation from Satellite Images with Diffusion
figure: First 3D urban scene generation from satellite images using diffusion models.
abstract: Sat2Scene introduces a novel architecture for generating 3D urban scenes directly from satellite images, addressing challenges related to view changes and scene scale. By leveraging diffusion models and neural rendering techniques, it generates texture colors at the point level and transforms them into a scene representation, enabling rendering from arbitrary views. The model shows strong performa

title: Diverse Part Synthesis for 3D Shape Creation
figure: First method for diverse part generation in 3D shape synthesis via multimodal deep generative models
abstract: This paper explores techniques for generating diverse suggestions for individual parts in 3D shape synthesis using multimodal deep generative models. It introduces a part-based representation of shapes and evaluates various generative models to enhance user control over part generation while ensuring high fidelity in the final shapes.

title: Consistent3D: Towards Consistent High-Fidelity Text-to-3D Generation with Deterministic Sampling Prior
figure: First method that uses ODE deterministic sampling for high-fidelity text-to-3D generation.
abstract: Consistent3D addresses the issues of geometry collapse and poor textures in text-to-3D generation by utilizing an ODE deterministic sampling prior. This method improves the consistency and fidelity of generated 3D objects and scenes by guiding the sampling process with a less noisy sample. Experimental results demonstrate its effectiveness in producing diverse and high-quality 3D outputs.

title: Efficient4D: Fast Dynamic 3D Object Generation from a Single-view Video
figure: First efficient framework for dynamic 3D object generation from single-view video via 4D Gaussian splatting.
abstract: Efficient4D presents a novel framework for generating dynamic 3D objects from single-view videos, addressing challenges related to 4D labeled data. It utilizes a 4D Gaussian splatting model to reconstruct content from high-quality images generated under various camera views. The method significantly improves speed and maintains quality, achieving real-time rendering and a tenfold increase in effic

title: HexaGen3D: StableDiffusion is just one step away from Fast and Diverse Text-to-3D Generation
figure: First efficient text-to-3D generation method using pretrained 2D diffusion models.
abstract: HexaGen3D addresses the challenge of generating high-quality 3D assets from text prompts by fine-tuning a pretrained text-to-image model to predict orthographic projections and a latent triplane. This method allows for quick inference of diverse objects without per-sample optimization, achieving better quality-to-latency trade-offs compared to existing methods.

title: 3D-PreMise: Can Large Language Models Generate 3D Shapes with Sharp Features and Parametric Control?
figure: First framework that employs LLMs to generate text-driven 3D shapes with sharp features.
abstract: 3D-PreMise introduces a framework using Large Language Models to generate 3D shapes with sharp features through text input and parametric control. It addresses challenges in accurately modeling geometries for industrial design and presents a dataset for 3D parametric modeling. The work explores effective generation strategies and the self-correction capabilities of LLMs.

title: GO-NeRF: Generating Objects in Neural Radiance Fields for Virtual Reality Content Creation
figure: First method to generate 3D objects in NeRF scenes via text prompts.
abstract: GO-NeRF introduces a novel pipeline for generating 3D objects within established Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) scenes, utilizing text prompts and user-defined regions. The method integrates generated objects seamlessly into existing scenes while addressing optimization challenges to enhance quality and context awareness. Experiments show its effectiveness in creating harmonious 3D objects and high

title: Score Distillation Sampling with Learned Manifold Corrective
figure: First to improve Score Distillation Sampling for text-to-3D synthesis via a novel loss formulation
abstract: This paper analyzes and improves the Score Distillation Sampling (SDS) method, which uses an image diffusion model for optimization tasks guided by text prompts. The authors propose a new loss formulation that mitigates issues with noisy gradients, demonstrating its effectiveness in various applications, including text-to-3D synthesis.

title: AGG: Amortized Generative 3D Gaussians for Single Image to 3D
figure: First amortized generative model for 3D Gaussian generation from a single image.
abstract: AGG introduces a framework for generating 3D Gaussians from a single image, improving efficiency by eliminating per-instance optimization. It uses a hybrid representation for joint optimization of 3D Gaussian locations and appearance attributes, and includes a cascaded pipeline for coarse representation generation and super-resolution. AGG outperforms existing methods in both speed and quality.

title: What You See is What You GAN: Rendering Every Pixel for High-Fidelity Geometry in 3D GANs
figure: First method to scale neural volume rendering for high-resolution 3D geometry in GANs
abstract: This paper presents techniques to enhance 3D GANs by scaling neural volume rendering to higher resolutions, allowing for the generation of fine-grained 3D geometry from 2D images. The approach improves multiview consistency and image quality without relying on post-processing, achieving state-of-the-art results in 3D geometric quality.

title: On Optimal Sampling for Learning SDF Using MLPs Equipped with Positional Encoding
figure: First method to determine optimal sampling rate for learning SDF via Fourier analysis
abstract: This paper addresses the issue of noisy artifacts in neural implicit fields, specifically SDFs, when using MLPs with positional encoding. It proposes a method to determine the appropriate sampling rate for accurate SDF learning, based on Fourier analysis, leading to improved fitting results without increasing the sampling rate unnecessarily.

title: SteinDreamer: Variance Reduction for Text-to-3D Score Distillation via Stein Identity
figure: First method to reduce variance in text-to-3D score distillation via Stein identity.
abstract: SteinDreamer introduces a variance reduction technique for text-to-3D score distillation, leveraging Stein's identity to optimize gradient estimation. This approach enhances visual quality and convergence speed for both object and scene generation by incorporating flexible guidance priors and network architectures.

title: Taming Mode Collapse in Score Distillation for Text-to-3D Generation
figure: First method to address mode collapse in text-to-3D generation via entropy maximization.
abstract: This paper addresses the mode collapse issue in score distillation for text-to-3D generation, which leads to view inconsistency known as the Janus artifact. The authors propose a new method, Entropic Score Distillation (ESD), that re-establishes the entropy term in the variational objective to encourage diversity among generated views, effectively mitigating the Janus problem.

title: 4DGen: Grounded 4D Content Generation with Spatial-temporal Consistency
figure: First framework for grounded 4D content generation via dynamic 3D Gaussians
abstract: 4DGen introduces a novel framework for generating 4D content with spatial-temporal consistency, utilizing monocular video sequences and dynamic 3D Gaussians. It enhances control over motion generation and improves the quality of 4D outputs compared to existing methods, allowing for grounded generation from text and image inputs.

title: HarmonyView: Harmonizing Consistency and Diversity in One-Image-to-3D
figure: First method that harmonizes consistency and diversity in single-image 3D generation via diffusion sampling.
abstract: HarmonyView addresses the challenge of balancing consistency and diversity in single-image 3D generation. By introducing a diffusion sampling technique, it effectively decomposes these aspects, enhancing the generation of diverse 3D shapes from 2D images. The work also proposes a new evaluation metric to assess the diversity of generated views, aligning closely with human judgments.

title: Hyper-VolTran: Fast and Generalizable One-Shot Image to 3D Object Structure via HyperNetworks
figure: First method to achieve fast and generalizable one-shot image to 3D object structure via HyperNetworks.
abstract: Hyper-VolTran introduces a novel neural rendering technique for one-shot image-to-3D object generation, utilizing signed distance functions and HyperNetworks for generalization. It builds neural encoding volumes from multi-view inputs and adapts the SDF network weights at test-time, improving consistency and reducing artifacts in generated views. The method avoids scene-specific optimization, demo

title: Neural Point Cloud Diffusion for Disentangled 3D Shape and Appearance Generation
figure: First method enabling disentangled 3D shape and appearance generation via diffusion.
abstract: This paper introduces a novel approach for controllable generation of 3D assets using a hybrid point cloud and neural radiance field. It allows for disentangled generation of shape and appearance, enabling independent sampling and control. The method achieves state-of-the-art results in generation quality, significantly reducing FID scores compared to previous methods.

title: Align Your Gaussians: Text-to-4D with Dynamic 3D Gaussians and Composed Diffusion Models
figure: First method to synthesize dynamic 3D objects in a text-to-4D setting via score distillation.
abstract: This paper presents Align Your Gaussians (AYG), a method for synthesizing dynamic 3D objects using text-to-4D diffusion models. It combines techniques from text-to-image, text-to-video, and 3D-aware multiview models to ensure temporal consistency and high-quality geometry. AYG utilizes dynamic 3D Gaussian Splatting and introduces novel methods for regularizing Gaussian distributions and motion amp

title: Deep Learning on Object-centric 3D Neural Fields
figure: First framework that generates compact latent representations for 3D Neural Fields via nf2vec
abstract: This paper introduces nf2vec, a framework for generating compact latent representations of 3D objects using Neural Fields (NFs). It addresses the integration of NFs into deep learning pipelines and demonstrates the effectiveness of the approach on various 3D surface representations, including neural radiance fields.

title: Repaint123: Fast and High-quality One Image to 3D Generation with Progressive Controllable 2D Repainting
figure: First method to generate high-quality 3D content from a single image using adaptive repainting via SDS
abstract: Repaint123 addresses deficiencies in one image to 3D generation methods by combining 2D diffusion image generation with a repainting strategy. It enhances multi-view consistency and texture quality while speeding up the generation process. The method allows for fast 3D content generation using simple MSE loss, achieving high-quality results in just 2 minutes.

title: ShowRoom3D: Text to High-Quality 3D Room Generation Using 3D Priors
figure: First method to generate high-quality 3D room-scale scenes from text using 3D diffusion priors.
abstract: ShowRoom3D is a three-stage approach that generates high-quality 3D room-scale scenes from text by utilizing a 3D diffusion prior. It improves upon previous methods by optimizing NeRF through a progressive view selection process and pose transformation, resulting in better structural integrity and clarity from various perspectives.

title: Scene-Conditional 3D Object Stylization and Composition
figure: First framework for stylizing 3D assets to fit into given 2D scenes via differentiable ray tracing.
abstract: This paper presents a framework for stylizing existing 3D assets to fit into specific 2D scenes, enhancing control over object appearance and scene composition. By optimizing textures and lighting through differentiable ray tracing and leveraging pre-trained text-to-image diffusion models, the method allows for versatile stylization across various environments. The approach is demonstrated on a ra

title: Point Cloud Part Editing: Segmentation, Generation, Assembly, and Selection
figure: First model for part editing that employs feature disentanglement and constraint via a four-stage process.
abstract: The paper presents SGAS, a model for point cloud part editing that ensures diversity and fidelity through a four-stage process: Segmentation, Generation, Assembly, and Selection. It introduces feature disentanglement and constraint strategies to improve part editing quality. SGAS also enables unsupervised part-aware point cloud generation, achieving state-of-the-art results in experiments.

title: Self-supervised Learning for Enhancing Geometrical Modeling in 3D-Aware Generative Adversarial Network
figure: First self-supervised learning technique to enhance 3D geometrical modeling in GANs via inversion.
abstract: This paper presents a self-supervised learning technique to improve 3D geometrical modeling in 3D-aware GANs, addressing issues like mesh imperfections due to limited annotated data. The method introduces a Cyclic Generative Constraint to enhance the latent space and integrates seamlessly with existing GAN architectures. Experiments validate its effectiveness across various datasets.

title: Text-Image Conditioned Diffusion for Consistent Text-to-3D Generation
figure: First text-to-3D method that incorporates multi-view image conditions for fine-grained view consistency via NeRF optimization
abstract: This paper presents a text-to-3D generation method that enhances multi-view consistency by incorporating multi-view image conditions into the NeRF optimization process. The approach addresses issues of floaters and empty spaces in generated scenes, achieving state-of-the-art performance on the T$^3$Bench dataset. The authors plan to release the code publicly.

title: VolumeDiffusion: Flexible Text-to-3D Generation with Efficient Volumetric Encoder
figure: First text-to-3D generation method using a volumetric encoder via diffusion.
abstract: This paper presents a novel 3D volumetric encoder for text-to-3D generation, utilizing a lightweight network to extract feature volumes from multi-view images. The model, trained on the Objaverse dataset, effectively generates diverse 3D samples from text prompts and allows for detailed control over object characteristics, enhancing creativity by merging multiple concepts.

title: Mosaic-SDF for 3D Generative Models
figure: First effective 3D shape representation using Mosaic-SDF for generative models via flow.
abstract: This paper introduces Mosaic-SDF, a new 3D shape representation that approximates the Signed Distance Function using local grids near the shape's boundary. It is efficient for training generative models, allowing for class-conditioned and text-to-3D generation. The representation is compatible with existing neural architectures and demonstrates improved performance over standard methods.

title: PI3D: Efficient Text-to-3D Generation with Pseudo-Image Diffusion
figure: First efficient text-to-3D generation framework leveraging pseudo-image diffusion.
abstract: PI3D is a framework that connects 2D and 3D domains by representing 3D shapes as Pseudo RGB Images, enabling high-quality 3D shape generation from text prompts. It fine-tunes a text-to-image diffusion model to produce these pseudo-images and employs score distillation sampling for iterative refinement, achieving significant improvements in generation quality and speed.

title: UniDream: Unifying Diffusion Priors for Relightable Text-to-3D Generation
figure: First text-to-3D generation framework using unified diffusion priors for relightable objects.
abstract: UniDream is a text-to-3D generation framework that addresses limitations in realism due to lighting effects in existing models. It employs a dual-phase training process and a progressive generation procedure to produce well-geometrical and textured 3D objects, enhancing realism and relighting capabilities.

title: SceneWiz3D: Towards Text-guided 3D Scene Composition
figure: First method to synthesize high-fidelity 3D scenes from text using a hybrid representation.
abstract: SceneWiz3D introduces a novel approach for generating detailed 3D scenes from text, combining explicit object representation with implicit scene representation. It utilizes Particle Swarm Optimization for layout configuration and incorporates an RGBD panorama diffusion model to enhance geometry quality, achieving superior results compared to previous methods.

title: Fast Training of Diffusion Transformer with Extreme Masking for 3D Point Clouds Generation
figure: First efficient 3D point cloud generator using masked diffusion transformers
abstract: FastDiT-3D is a novel masked diffusion transformer designed for efficient generation of high-quality 3D point clouds. It reduces training costs significantly by employing a voxel-aware masking strategy and Mixture-of-Expert techniques, achieving state-of-the-art performance on the ShapeNet dataset with a high masking ratio.

title: Sherpa3D: Boosting High-Fidelity Text-to-3D Generation via Coarse 3D Prior
figure: First text-to-3D framework that enhances 2D lifting optimization using coarse 3D prior for high-fidelity generation.
abstract: Sherpa3D is a text-to-3D framework that improves the generation of high-quality 3D assets by leveraging coarse 3D knowledge to guide 2D diffusion models. It employs structural and semantic guidance to enhance geometric fidelity and coherence, resulting in superior 3D consistency and quality compared to existing methods.

title: DreamControl: Control-Based Text-to-3D Generation with 3D Self-Prior
figure: First controllable text-to-3D generation method using a two-stage 2D-lifting framework via score distillation.
abstract: DreamControl introduces a two-stage framework for controllable text-to-3D generation, addressing geometry inconsistencies in previous methods. By optimizing coarse NeRF scenes as 3D self-priors and employing control-based score distillation, it ensures high-quality 3D content with consistent geometry and detailed textures. The method is adaptable for various downstream tasks, including user-guided

title: MVDD: Multi-View Depth Diffusion Models
figure: First model to generate high-quality dense point clouds using multi-view depth via diffusion.
abstract: MVDD leverages multi-view depth to generate high-quality dense point clouds and 3D meshes using a diffusion model. It introduces an epipolar line segment attention mechanism for 3D consistency and incorporates a depth fusion module. The model excels in 3D shape generation and depth completion, demonstrating state-of-the-art results and potential for various downstream tasks.

title: RL Dreams: Policy Gradient Optimization for Score Distillation based 3D Generation
figure: First method that extends policy gradient methods to 3D score-based rendering via SDS.
abstract: This paper presents DDPO3D, a novel approach that integrates policy gradient optimization with score distillation for 3D generation. It demonstrates the effectiveness of aesthetic scoring in enhancing the quality of 3D assets generated from 2D diffusion models, marking a significant advancement in text-to-3D synthesis.

title: Deep3DSketch: 3D modeling from Free-hand Sketches with View- and Structural-Aware Adversarial Training
figure: First 3D modeling from free-hand sketches using view- and structural-aware adversarial training
abstract: Deep3DSketch addresses the challenges of 3D modeling from single free-hand sketches, which often suffer from sparsity and ambiguity. The method employs a view- and structural-aware approach, utilizing random pose sampling and adversarial training to enhance shape structure learning. Experiments show it achieves state-of-the-art performance on both synthetic and real datasets.

title: TeMO: Towards Text-Driven 3D Stylization for Multi-Object Meshes
figure: First method for text-driven 3D stylization of multi-object meshes via contrast supervision.
abstract: TeMO introduces a framework for text-driven 3D stylization of multi-object scenes, addressing challenges in existing methods that focus on single objects. It employs a Decoupled Graph Attention module and a Cross-Grained Contrast supervision system to enhance feature alignment and improve stylization quality. The method demonstrates superior performance on various multi-object 3D meshes.

title: Text-to-3D Generation with Bidirectional Diffusion using both 2D and 3D priors
figure: First text-to-3D generation method using bidirectional diffusion with 2D and 3D priors
abstract: The paper presents Bidirectional Diffusion (BiDiff), a framework that combines 2D and 3D diffusion processes to enhance the quality and consistency of 3D object generation. By leveraging both 3D fidelity and 2D texture richness, BiDiff reduces generation time significantly while producing high-quality and diverse 3D models. Experimental results demonstrate its effectiveness in generating scalable

title: Doodle Your 3D: From Abstract Freehand Sketches to Precise 3D Shapes
figure: First method that generates precise 3D shapes from abstract sketches via part-level modelling.
abstract: This paper presents a method for generating 3D shapes from abstract sketches, addressing the challenges of drawing skills. It introduces a part-level modelling framework that aligns sketches with 3D shapes without requiring paired datasets. The approach allows for in-position editing and operates in a low-dimensional implicit space, enhancing efficiency.

title: WonderJourney: Going from Anywhere to Everywhere
figure: First framework for perpetual 3D scene generation from any location via text or image.
abstract: WonderJourney is a modular framework that generates a sequence of diverse and coherent 3D scenes based on user-provided locations through text or images. It utilizes a text-driven point cloud generation pipeline and a large visual language model to ensure the scenes are compelling and connected, creating imaginative journeys.

title: XCube: Large-Scale 3D Generative Modeling using Sparse Voxel Hierarchies
figure: First model to generate high-resolution sparse 3D voxel grids using a hierarchical voxel latent diffusion model.
abstract: XCube is a generative model for high-resolution sparse 3D voxel grids, capable of generating millions of voxels efficiently. It employs a hierarchical diffusion approach to create progressively higher resolution grids and can handle large outdoor scenes. The model supports unconditional generation and various tasks like user-guided editing and text-to-3D.

title: TPA3D: Triplane Attention for Fast Text-to-3D Generation
figure: First GAN-based model for fast text-to-3D generation using Triplane Attention
abstract: TPA3D introduces a GAN-based model for efficient text-to-3D generation, leveraging Triplane Attention to synthesize 3D mesh data from 2D images and text descriptions. The model demonstrates high-quality output and computational efficiency, addressing the challenges of existing diffusion-based methods.

title: ImageDream: Image-Prompt Multi-view Diffusion for 3D Generation
figure: First image-prompt multi-view diffusion model for 3D object generation.
abstract: ImageDream is a novel multi-view diffusion model that generates high-quality 3D models from image prompts. It employs a canonical camera coordination to enhance visual geometry accuracy and incorporates various control levels to shape object layout and details. The model's effectiveness is validated through extensive evaluations, and further information is available on its project page.

title: ControlDreamer: Blending Geometry and Style in Text-to-3D
figure: First text-to-3D model that blends geometry and style via a multi-view diffusion approach
abstract: ControlDreamer enhances text-to-3D generation by integrating a depth-aware multi-view diffusion model, allowing for the creation of stylized 3D models. It includes a benchmark for 3D style editing across various subjects, demonstrating superior performance compared to existing methods through human evaluations and CLIP scores.

title: DiverseDream: Diverse Text-to-3D Synthesis with Augmented Text Embedding
figure: First method to enhance diversity in text-to-3D synthesis via augmented text prompts.
abstract: DiverseDream addresses the issue of limited diversity in text-to-3D synthesis by proposing a method that generates multiple 3D models from the same text prompt using augmented text prompts. This approach improves the diversity of generated models both qualitatively and quantitatively.

title: StableDreamer: Taming Noisy Score Distillation Sampling for Text-to-3D
figure: First text-to-3D generation method that improves score distillation sampling via a two-stage training strategy.
abstract: StableDreamer addresses challenges in text-to-3D generation caused by noisy score distillation sampling. It introduces a two-stage training strategy that combines image-space and latent-space diffusion, enhancing geometric precision and color rendition. Additionally, it employs an anisotropic 3D Gaussian representation to improve model quality and efficiency, resulting in high-fidelity 3D models w

title: GraphDreamer: Compositional 3D Scene Synthesis from Scene Graphs
figure: First framework to generate compositional 3D scenes from scene graphs via text-to-image diffusion models
abstract: GraphDreamer introduces a method for generating complex 3D scenes from scene graphs, addressing limitations of existing holistic 3D modeling approaches. By leveraging node and edge information, it enhances the use of pretrained text-to-image models, allowing for better disentanglement of objects and their relationships without requiring image-level supervision.

title: X-Dreamer: Creating High-quality 3D Content by Bridging the Domain Gap Between Text-to-2D and Text-to-3D Generation
figure: First method that bridges the domain gap between text-to-2D and text-to-3D generation via innovative designs.
abstract: X-Dreamer is a novel approach for high-quality text-to-3D content creation that addresses the domain gap between 2D images and 3D assets. It introduces Camera-Guided Low-Rank Adaptation and Attention-Mask Alignment Loss to enhance the generation of 3D objects, ensuring better alignment with camera perspectives and focusing on detailed foreground objects. Evaluations show its effectiveness over exi

title: CG3D: Compositional Generation for Text-to-3D via Gaussian Splatting
figure: First method for compositional text-to-3D generation via Gaussian splatting.
abstract: CG3D addresses limitations in text-conditioned 3D generation by enabling the creation of detailed, multi-object scenes with semantically and physically consistent compositions. Utilizing explicit Gaussian radiance fields, it surpasses existing models in object combinations and physics accuracy.

title: Spice-E : Structural Priors in 3D Diffusion using Cross-Entity Attention
figure: First 3D diffusion model that incorporates structural priors using cross-entity attention.
abstract: Spice-E enhances 3D diffusion models by introducing a cross-entity attention mechanism, allowing for interaction between paired input and guidance 3D shapes. This framework supports various applications, including 3D stylization and semantic shape editing, achieving state-of-the-art performance while being faster than existing methods.

title: GeoDream: Disentangling 2D and Geometric Priors for High-Fidelity and Consistent 3D Generation
figure: First method to enhance 3D generation by disentangling 2D and geometric priors via a multi-view diffusion model
abstract: GeoDream addresses the challenges of inconsistent 3D geometric structures in text-to-3D generation by integrating explicit 3D priors with 2D diffusion models. This approach enhances spatial consistency and fidelity in generated 3D meshes, leading to high-resolution and semantically coherent outputs.

title: ShapeGPT: 3D Shape Generation with A Unified Multi-modal Language Model
figure: First unified multi-modal language model for 3D shape generation via instruction-based approaches
abstract: ShapeGPT is a multi-modal framework that integrates pre-trained language models for 3D shape generation tasks. It discretizes continuous shapes into shape words and aligns them with instructional text, enabling tasks like text-to-shape and shape editing. The model demonstrates strong performance across various shape-related applications.

title: Surf-D: Generating High-Quality Surfaces of Arbitrary Topologies Using Diffusion Models
figure: First method to generate high-quality 3D shapes with arbitrary topologies using diffusion models.
abstract: Surf-D is a novel approach for generating high-quality 3D shapes as surfaces with arbitrary topologies using diffusion models. It utilizes Unsigned Distance Fields for representation and a point-based AutoEncoder for efficient latent space learning. The method supports various generation tasks, including unconditional, category conditional, image conditional, and text-to-shape generation, outperfo

title: RichDreamer: A Generalizable Normal-Depth Diffusion Model for Detail Richness in Text-to-3D
figure: First Normal-Depth diffusion model for detail-rich text-to-3D generation.
abstract: RichDreamer addresses the challenges of 3D generation from 2D diffusion by proposing a Normal-Depth diffusion model that leverages normal and depth information for scene geometry. It integrates an albedo diffusion model to improve material representation and achieves state-of-the-art results in detail richness when used in text-to-3D pipelines.

title: DreamPropeller: Supercharge Text-to-3D Generation with Parallel Sampling
figure: First acceleration algorithm for text-to-3D generation via parallel sampling.
abstract: DreamPropeller is an acceleration algorithm designed to enhance text-to-3D generation by improving the speed of existing score distillation methods. It generalizes classical Picard iterations for parallel sampling, achieving significant speedups while maintaining generation quality across various frameworks.

title: Direct2.5: Diverse Text-to-3D Generation via Multi-view 2.5D Diffusion
figure: First diverse text-to-3D generation via multi-view 2.5D diffusion.
abstract: This paper presents a novel approach to 3D content generation using a multi-view 2.5D diffusion model fine-tuned from a pre-trained 2D diffusion model. It effectively combines the strengths of 2D and 3D diffusion methods, allowing for diverse and high-fidelity 3D model generation without the need for time-consuming post-processing. The method achieves fast inference and consistent 3D model creatio

title: ET3D: Efficient Text-to-3D Generation via Multi-View Distillation
figure: First efficient text-to-3D generation method via multi-view distillation.
abstract: ET3D introduces a novel approach for text-to-3D generation that significantly reduces generation time to around 8 ms per asset by leveraging images from a pre-trained text-to-image diffusion model to train a text-conditioned 3D GAN. This method eliminates the need for 3D training data and enhances user experience by improving generation speed.

title: MeshGPT: Generating Triangle Meshes with Decoder-Only Transformers
figure: First autoregressive model for generating triangle meshes using decoder-only transformers
abstract: MeshGPT presents a novel method for generating triangle meshes that mimics the compactness of artist-created meshes. Utilizing a sequence-based autoregressive approach, it learns a vocabulary of latent embeddings to effectively reconstruct and generate new triangle meshes. The model shows significant improvements over existing methods in shape coverage and FID scores.

title: Functional Diffusion
figure: First generative diffusion model for 3D shapes using functional representation.
abstract: Functional diffusion is a novel generative model that extends classical diffusion to handle samples represented by functions in continuous domains. It can generate various data types, including 3D shapes, with a focus on irregular data. The paper presents foundational work and an implementation based on transformers, demonstrating generative capabilities on signed distance functions and deformatio

title: MVControl: Adding Conditional Control to Multi-view Diffusion for Controllable Text-to-3D Generation
figure: First method to enhance multi-view diffusion for controllable text-to-3D generation via a new conditioning mechanism.
abstract: MVControl is a novel architecture that improves multi-view 2D diffusion models by adding input conditions like edge maps, enabling controllable generation of multi-view images and consistent 3D content. It introduces a conditioning mechanism for precise shape and view control, utilizing score-distillation for 3D content generation. Extensive experiments show robust generalization and high-quality

title: Boosting3D: High-Fidelity Image-to-3D by Boosting 2D Diffusion Prior to 3D Prior with Progressive Learning
figure: First method that boosts 2D diffusion prior to 3D prior for single image-to-3D generation via progressive learning
abstract: Boosting3D is a multi-stage method for generating 3D objects from single images, addressing view consistency by modeling geometric structures. It utilizes a progressive training strategy with a LoRA and NeRF to enhance 3D information extraction, achieving state-of-the-art results in single image-to-3D generation.

title: FrePolad: Frequency-Rectified Point Latent Diffusion for Point Cloud Generation
figure: First point cloud generation method using frequency-rectified latent diffusion via VAE.
abstract: FrePolad introduces a point cloud generation pipeline that combines a variational autoencoder with a denoising diffusion model. It enhances generation quality and diversity while allowing variable point cloud cardinality. The method employs frequency rectification to preserve high-frequency details and demonstrates state-of-the-art performance in efficiency and quality. A project page is available

title: LucidDreamer: Towards High-Fidelity Text-to-3D Generation via Interval Score Matching
figure: First high-fidelity text-to-3D generation via Interval Score Matching.
abstract: LucidDreamer addresses the challenges in text-to-3D generation, particularly the low-quality outputs from Score Distillation Sampling. By introducing Interval Score Matching and integrating 3D Gaussian Splatting, the model significantly enhances the quality and efficiency of generating detailed 3D assets.

title: MetaDreamer: Efficient Text-to-3D Creation With Disentangling Geometry and Texture
figure: First efficient text-to-3D generation method that disentangles geometry and texture via two-stage optimization.
abstract: MetaDreamer addresses challenges in 3D object synthesis by introducing a two-stage optimization approach that separates geometry and texture. It leverages 2D and 3D prior knowledge to ensure multi-view consistency and improve generation speed, achieving high-quality 3D objects from textual prompts in under 20 minutes.

title: DMV3D: Denoising Multi-View Diffusion using 3D Large Reconstruction Model
figure: First 3D generation model that denoises multi-view images using a transformer-based approach via NeRF.
abstract: DMV3D is a novel 3D generation method that employs a transformer-based large reconstruction model to denoise multi-view diffusion. It utilizes a triplane NeRF representation for effective denoising and achieves state-of-the-art results in single-image reconstruction and text-to-3D generation, all without needing 3D assets. The method demonstrates high-quality outputs and efficiency on large-scale

title: Instant3D: Instant Text-to-3D Generation
figure: First fast text-to-3D generation framework that constructs a 3D triplane from text in under one second via a feedforward network
abstract: Instant3D introduces a novel framework for rapid text-to-3D generation, enabling the creation of 3D objects from unseen text prompts in less than one second. The method employs a new network architecture that constructs a 3D triplane directly from text, utilizing mechanisms like cross-attention and style injection for precise output alignment. Extensive experiments show its efficiency and performa

title: One-2-3-45++: Fast Single Image to 3D Objects with Consistent Multi-View Generation and 3D Diffusion
figure: First method to transform a single image into a detailed 3D textured mesh in approximately one minute via 3D diffusion.
abstract: One-2-3-45++ is a novel method for fast single image to 3D object generation, achieving high fidelity and rapid generation speeds. It leverages 2D diffusion models for multi-view image generation and elevates these to 3D using conditioned 3D diffusion models, producing diverse 3D assets that closely resemble the input image.

title: 3DStyle-Diffusion: Pursuing Fine-grained Text-driven 3D Stylization with 2D Diffusion Models
figure: First model that enables fine-grained text-driven stylization of 3D meshes via 2D diffusion models
abstract: 3DStyle-Diffusion addresses the challenge of text-driven 3D content creation by integrating controllable appearance and geometric guidance from 2D diffusion models. It parameterizes 3D mesh textures and achieves accurate depth maps, allowing for high-quality stylization that aligns with text prompts. The model is validated through qualitative and quantitative experiments, and source code is availa

title: Control3D: Towards Controllable Text-to-3D Generation
figure: First text-to-3D generation method that incorporates hand-drawn sketches for enhanced controllability via a conditioned diffusion model.
abstract: Control3D introduces a novel approach to text-to-3D generation that allows users to interactively control and shape 3D content based on text prompts and hand-drawn sketches. By remoulding a 2D conditioned diffusion model to guide the learning of 3D scenes, it ensures that generated views align with both the text and sketches, resulting in accurate and faithful 3D scene generation.

title: EXIM: A Hybrid Explicit-Implicit Representation for Text-Guided 3D Shape Generation
figure: First hybrid explicit-implicit representation for text-guided 3D shape generation.
abstract: This paper introduces EXIM, a novel technique for generating 3D shapes from text using a hybrid representation that combines explicit and implicit methods. It allows for high-fidelity shape generation without extensive optimization or reliance on human-annotated texts. The approach also ensures shape-color consistency and is applicable to generating indoor scenes. The results show significant impr

title: Generative Neural Fields by Mixtures of Neural Implicit Functions
figure: First generative neural fields using mixtures of implicit functions via denoising diffusion.
abstract: This paper introduces a method for learning generative neural fields through linear combinations of implicit basis networks. It enhances the capacity of generative models while keeping inference efficient. The approach utilizes a customized denoising diffusion model to sample latent mixture coefficients, demonstrating strong performance in generating images, voxel data, and NeRF scenes across vari

title: Text-to-3D with Classifier Score Distillation
figure: First text-to-3D generation method that relies solely on classifier-free guidance via Score Distillation.
abstract: This paper presents Classifier Score Distillation (CSD), a novel approach for text-to-3D generation that emphasizes the role of classifier-free guidance. The method demonstrates effectiveness in various tasks, including shape generation and editing, outperforming existing state-of-the-art techniques. The findings provide new insights into the optimization of text-to-3D generation.

title: General Point Model with Autoencoding and Autoregressive
figure: First model that integrates autoencoding and autoregressive tasks for point cloud generation.
abstract: The General Point Model (GPM) combines autoencoding and autoregressive tasks in a point cloud transformer, enabling both unconditional and conditional generation. It enhances masked prediction and shows competitive results in point cloud understanding and generation tasks, outperforming existing models.

title: Ghost on the Shell: An Expressive Representation of General 3D Shapes
figure: First method to parameterize open surfaces using manifold signed distance fields for generative modeling via G-Shell.
abstract: G-Shell introduces a new representation for 3D shapes that combines watertight and non-watertight meshes, enabling fast reconstruction and generative modeling. It addresses the limitations of traditional mesh representations by allowing for both solid and open surfaces, achieving state-of-the-art results in non-watertight mesh tasks.

title: Enhancing High-Resolution 3D Generation through Pixel-wise Gradient Clipping
figure: First method to enhance high-resolution 3D generation via Pixel-wise Gradient Clipping.
abstract: This paper addresses the challenge of high-resolution 3D object generation by introducing Pixel-wise Gradient Clipping (PGC), which optimizes gradient propagation in latent representation-based models. By controlling stochastic gradients, PGC improves texture synthesis quality in existing 3D generative models, demonstrating significant performance enhancements in high-resolution rendering.

title: Progressive3D: Progressively Local Editing for Text-to-3D Content Creation with Complex Semantic Prompts
figure: First framework for progressively local editing in text-to-3D generation with complex prompts.
abstract: Progressive3D introduces a framework for text-to-3D generation that allows for precise content creation through locally progressive editing steps. It addresses the challenge of generating accurate 3D content for complex semantic prompts by focusing on user-defined regions and employing a semantic component suppression technique. The method is adaptable to various text-to-3D approaches.

title: GaussianDreamer: Fast Generation from Text to 3D Gaussians by Bridging 2D and 3D Diffusion Models
figure: First fast text-to-3D Gaussian generation via bridging 2D and 3D diffusion models
abstract: GaussianDreamer proposes a novel framework for generating 3D objects from text prompts by combining the strengths of 2D and 3D diffusion models. It utilizes a 3D Gaussian splatting representation to enhance quality and consistency, achieving high-quality 3D instance generation in a fraction of the time compared to previous methods. Demos and code are available online.

title: HiFi-123: Towards High-fidelity One Image to 3D Content Generation
figure: First high-fidelity image-to-3D generation method using reference-guided techniques.
abstract: HiFi-123 introduces a method for high-fidelity 3D generation from a single image, addressing issues of blurred textures and inconsistencies in novel views. It features a Reference-Guided Novel View Enhancement technique and a Reference-Guided State Distillation loss, significantly improving the quality of 3D outputs and achieving state-of-the-art performance.

title: HYVE: Hybrid Vertex Encoder for Neural Distance Fields
figure: First hybrid vertex encoder for neural distance fields that outputs valid signed distance fields in a single forward pass.
abstract: This paper introduces a neural-network architecture for encoding 3D shapes using a hybrid system that combines graph-based and voxel-based components. It allows for accurate shape representation and outputs valid signed distance fields without needing prior knowledge of non-zero distance values. The architecture reduces computational overhead and is applicable to complex geometries.

title: IPDreamer: Appearance-Controllable 3D Object Generation with Complex Image Prompts
figure: First method for appearance-controllable 3D object generation from complex image prompts via diffusion.
abstract: IPDreamer addresses the challenges of generating appearance-controllable 3D objects from complex images by capturing intricate features and aligning them with synthesized 3D objects. The method shows consistent high-quality results that align with both textual and image prompts, demonstrating its effectiveness in 3D object generation.

title: Consistent123: One Image to Highly Consistent 3D Asset Using Case-Aware Diffusion Priors
figure: First case-aware method for highly consistent 3D asset reconstruction from a single image via diffusion priors
abstract: Consistent123 introduces a two-stage method for reconstructing 3D objects from a single image, enhancing consistency and generalization through case-aware diffusion priors. The first stage focuses on 3D structural priors, while the second stage refines details using 2D texture priors. This approach significantly improves the quality of generated 3D assets compared to existing methods.

title: DreamGaussian: Generative Gaussian Splatting for Efficient 3D Content Creation
figure: First efficient 3D content generation framework using Gaussian Splatting via score distillation.
abstract: DreamGaussian introduces a novel framework for 3D content generation that combines efficiency and quality through a generative 3D Gaussian Splatting model. It features mesh extraction and texture refinement, achieving high-quality textured meshes from single-view images significantly faster than existing methods.

title: Learning Effective NeRFs and SDFs Representations with 3D Generative Adversarial Networks for 3D Object Generation
figure: First effective 3D object generation using NeRFs and SDFs with GANs
abstract: This paper presents a method for 3D object generation using NeRFs and SDFs with GANs, addressing challenges in generating complex and high-fidelity results. The approach incorporates geometry-aware GANs and optimizes representations for rendering and mesh generation, achieving competitive results in the ICCV 2023 OmniObject3D Challenge.

title: NeuRBF: A Neural Fields Representation with Adaptive Radial Basis Functions
figure: First neural fields representation using adaptive radial basis functions for 3D shape generation.
abstract: NeuRBF introduces a novel neural fields representation utilizing adaptive radial basis functions for improved signal representation. This method enhances spatial adaptivity and detail representation in 3D signed distance fields, achieving state-of-the-art rendering quality with a compact model size. Experiments demonstrate its superiority over traditional grid-based approaches.

title: Progressive Text-to-3D Generation for Automatic 3D Prototyping
figure: First progressive text-to-3D generation method using a Multi-Scale Triplane Network.
abstract: This paper presents a method for text-to-3D generation that utilizes a Multi-Scale Triplane Network and a progressive learning strategy to improve the generation of detailed 3D objects from natural language descriptions. The approach aims to facilitate automatic 3D prototyping by effectively managing the transition from low to high resolution in 3D outputs.

title: Large-Vocabulary 3D Diffusion Model with Transformer
figure: First large-vocabulary 3D object generator using a triplane-based diffusion model.
abstract: This paper presents DiffTF, a diffusion-based framework for generating a wide variety of 3D objects. It addresses challenges in 3D representation, geometry, and texture diversity by utilizing a triplane representation and a 3D-aware transformer. The model demonstrates state-of-the-art performance in generating diverse and high-quality 3D assets across over 200 categories.

title: SHIFT3D: Synthesizing Hard Inputs For Tricking 3D Detectors
figure: First method to generate challenging 3D shapes for object detectors via SDF deformation.
abstract: SHIFT3D introduces a differentiable pipeline for generating 3D shapes that are both structurally plausible and challenging for 3D object detectors. By using signed distance functions (SDF), the method allows for smooth deformations of shapes to confuse detectors, providing insights into vulnerabilities and potential safety risks in 3D perception systems.

title: Chasing Consistency in Text-to-3D Generation from a Single Image
figure: First framework for consistent Text-to-3D generation from a single image via a three-stage approach
abstract: Consist3D addresses inconsistency issues in Text-to-3D generation from single-view images by introducing a three-stage framework that enhances semantic and geometric consistency. The method learns parameterized consistency tokens and optimizes them to produce more faithful and photo-realistic 3D assets, while also enabling background and object editing through text prompts.

title: CityDreamer: Compositional Generative Model of Unbounded 3D Cities
figure: First compositional generative model for unbounded 3D cities via neural fields
abstract: CityDreamer is a generative model for creating unbounded 3D cities, addressing the complexities of urban environments. It utilizes a composition of neural fields for building instances and background elements, employing a bird's eye view representation. The model achieves state-of-the-art results in generating realistic city layouts and allows for localized editing within the generated scenes.

title: BuilDiff: 3D Building Shape Generation using Single-Image Conditional Point Cloud Diffusion Models
figure: First method for 3D building shape generation using single-image conditional point cloud diffusion models.
abstract: BuilDiff introduces a novel method for generating 3D building shapes from single images using point cloud diffusion models. It addresses limitations of existing methods that require specific viewing angles, allowing for more general-view image inputs. The approach combines two conditional diffusion models and a regularization strategy to enhance building roof synthesis while preserving overall str

title: MVDream: Multi-view Diffusion for 3D Generation
figure: First multi-view diffusion model that generates consistent 3D shapes from text prompts via Score Distillation Sampling.
abstract: MVDream is a diffusion model designed to generate consistent multi-view images from text prompts. It combines the generalizability of 2D diffusion models with the consistency of 3D renderings, functioning as a generalizable 3D prior. The model enhances existing 2D-lifting methods and can learn new concepts from limited 2D examples for 3D generation.

title: EfficientDreamer: High-Fidelity and Robust 3D Creation via Orthogonal-view Diffusion Prior
figure: First high-fidelity 3D content generation via orthogonal-view diffusion prior.
abstract: EfficientDreamer addresses the limitations of text-driven 3D content creation by introducing a novel 2D diffusion model that generates orthogonal-view images based on text prompts. This approach enhances geometric structure and resolves the Janus problem, leading to improved 3D consistency and quality. The method includes a 3D synthesis fusion network for further detail enhancement, outperforming

title: Few-Shot Physically-Aware Articulated Mesh Generation via Hierarchical Deformation
figure: First few-shot articulated mesh generator that ensures physical validity via hierarchical deformation.
abstract: This paper addresses few-shot articulated mesh generation by proposing a hierarchical mesh deformation model that enhances diversity and physical validity. The method leverages transferrable deformation patterns from rigid meshes and includes a physics-aware correction scheme. Experiments show improved performance in generating articulated meshes across various categories. Code and project page ar

title: Sketch and Text Guided Diffusion Model for Colored Point Cloud Generation
figure: First model that generates colored point clouds using sketch and text guidance via diffusion.
abstract: This paper presents a novel diffusion model for generating colored point clouds, guided by both hand-drawn sketches and textual descriptions. The model employs a joint diffusion process to learn the reverse diffusion, allowing for effective shape and color recovery.
